hash_a0f475d6ba600: ^1Scarlett: ^7You do have your moments, senor. This was one of them.
hash_a12475d6bab19: ^1Bruno: ^7I am not too proud to thank you. Keep this up and I may even call you friend.
hash_a14475d6bae7f: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, that was a sobering experience. Which means it's time for more 'special vitamins'...
hash_29af1be0c43418: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not that I'm keeping count, Bruno - but that was a LOT of ass kicking in a very short time!
hash_29b11be0c4377e: ^1Diego: ^7See what happens when you loosen up, Bruno? You have fun!
hash_29b41be0c43c97: ^1Shaw: ^7Easy Bruno - You're starting to get a bit 'indiscriminate'... It scares me.
hash_99c54f5bb29eb0: ^1Bruno: ^7Minus one arm, the monstre just seems a bit... ridiculous, non?
hash_99c64f5bb2a063: ^1Diego: ^7I want you dead, bestia! Not falling apart!
hash_99c84f5bb2a3c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's one less arm to whack me with.
hash_99cb4f5bb2a8e2: ^1Shaw: ^7Even wit no arms, these worm-brains are relentless!
hash_ae5ac6653aa098: ^1Shaw: ^7No more mafficking about for you, you pus-filled, four-legged monster!

hash_c3babb8a316a8a: ^1Diego: ^7You could at least buy me dinner first!
hash_eb408dee2a25fa: ^1Shaw: ^7Statistically speaking, we were bound to do something right eventually.
hash_efc9cf90d1b50b: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to shred some shamblers.    Or blast them. That works, too.
hash_efcccf90d1ba24: ^1Scarlett: ^7C'mon, girls, let's cut 'em down and blow 'em up.
hash_efcecf90d1bd8a: ^1Diego: ^7The question is not which will I use. It is which I will use first.
hash_efcfcf90d1bf3d: ^1Bruno: ^7Such beautiful craftsmanship. Such power. Such a bloody mess.
hash_10193565d989b50: ^1Bruno: ^7I think my stomach just turned inside out.
hash_10194565d989d03: ^1Diego: ^7I only put my trust in this, because it has worked before.     I hope I am not mistaken.
hash_10199565d98a582: ^1Shaw: ^7ZZZZZ! Fuck me! That's left my synapses twitching like a bastard!
hash_11f8bca875fd3f8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wanna set all the bone-brains on fire? Be my guest.
hash_11f8dca875fd75e: ^1Diego: ^7Burn, bestias. Truly - It is all you deserve.
hash_11f8eca875fd911: ^1Bruno: ^7They all just caught fire! Bravo! I am... entertained. Eh?
hash_11f90ca875fdc77: ^1Shaw: ^7Hang on a minute! How on earth did that cataclysmic explosion suddenly manifest out of nowhere?!
hash_1874d02ed4a06ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't I warn you before? Too late now!
hash_191218a2d2f136e: ^1Narrator: ^7Aiming down your sights significantly improves accuracy.
hash_1acc7f372c824ba: ^1Shaw: ^7You can run right off, you stabby-legged minge-bag!
hash_1dbb742542bc9f6: ^1Shaw: ^7Hmmm... This really feels like Cambodia all over again. But with a lot more water.
hash_1dbb942542bcd5c: ^1Bruno: ^7If you are the company you keep, then I must have died a long time ago.
hash_1dbba42542bcf0f: ^1Diego: ^7You all wish to face me? I can only assume you are unaware of my talents!
hash_1dbbc42542bd275: ^1Scarlett: ^7You think strength in numbers gives you an advantage? It doesn't.
hash_1ff17a026e1e65b: ^1Diego: ^7I have seen what mechanized weaponry can do - Many of my brothers fell before their unimaginable firepower.
hash_1ff19a026e1e9c1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oughtta be enough wipe the brain-deads clean off this deck.
hash_1ff1ca026e1eeda: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, this IS disproportionately out of proportion.

hash_2212fa980fd2706: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, if I cannot escape violence, at least I deliver it with style.
hash_22130a980fd28b9: ^1Diego: ^7Ahhh si. The three of us were made for each other, weren't we?
hash_22131a980fd2a6c: ^1Shaw: ^7Let's conduct a little experiment, shall we? Who gets the higher body count?

hash_2782b1afa1b9a57: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh my. This weapon is... rather large, isn't it?
hash_2ebdc4374618df0: ^1Bruno: ^7A good defense can be key to victory.
hash_2ebdd4374618fa3: ^1Diego: ^7I think this came together quite beautifully.
hash_2ebdf4374619309: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay... Let's take some of the heat of my back.
hash_2ebe24374619822: ^1Shaw: ^7Another multi-purposeful invention from Scarlett. She is very good at this kind of thing.
hash_2efda1b16039820: ^1Shaw: ^7It's making me nervous just watching you Bruno - You look absolutely fucked.
hash_2efdf1b1603a09f: ^1Scarlett: ^7You can handle them, Bruno. You're a big boy now, aren't you?
hash_2efe11b1603a405: ^1Diego: ^7I could help the Frenchman... but where would I find entertainment?
hash_2f1a16c785c1bfb: ^1Shaw: ^7Have I told them about the side effects? I'm sure I did.     Definitely.     I distinctly remember saying - 'YOU DO KNOW THERE ARE SIDE EFFECTS?'
hash_2f1a46c785c2114: ^1Scarlett: ^7I really wish my Father had been a bit more specific in his letter... Especially the stuff about what 'I did'.
hash_2f1a66c785c247a: ^1Diego: ^7In the brief time I knew her, I can honestly say that Lady McKendrick was the most... 'Scottish'... women I have ever known.
hash_2f1a76c785c262d: ^1Bruno: ^7Time moves faster as you get older - It feels only weeks since Alistair saved my life...
hash_31cadd683b794bb: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm guessing you creeps aren't looking to talk this through?
hash_31caed683b7966e: ^1Bruno: ^7I may be outnumbered, but I am not outgunned.
hash_31cafd683b79821: ^1Diego: ^7Do not worry, bestias - There is more than enough Diego to go around.
hash_31cb0d683b799d4: ^1Shaw: ^7Trying to get rid of you is like trying to get rid of a bad smell.     It takes time. And bleach.
hash_328cc2375a1b4fc: ^1Shaw: ^7You're a human mincer, Diego!    That sounded better in my head.
hash_3330633f96bbec9: ^1Shaw: ^7This one's racked with lightning. I'm sensing an elemental theme emerging...
hash_3330733f96bc07c: ^1Diego: ^7An electric chupacarne? I would say I am shocked...but I leave the bad jokes to Shaw.
hash_3330833f96bc22f: ^1Bruno: ^7This electric one looks like I felt with my first hangover.     Absinthe is a hell of a drink.
hash_3330933f96bc3e2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, so they're electric now?! Someone's stacking the deck against us.
hash_3643b235569acbb: ^1Shaw: ^7He's almost pocket sized! Not that I'd want him anywhere near my... bits and pieces.
hash_36440235569b53a: ^1Diego: ^7It has so much anger. Like the Frenchman, but tiny.
hash_36441235569b6ed: ^1Bruno: ^7I think there is 'a curse' involved here somewhere...
hash_368a2dae5c19ce6: ^1Shaw: ^7You've got to be aware of your surroundings Scarlett! I kept bumping into my desk until I finally remembered where it was.
hash_368a4dae5c1a04c: ^1Bruno: ^7Are ALL members of the Rhodes Family destined to find such trouble?
hash_368a5dae5c1a1ff: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett is surrounded. I should probably save her. It could make for an entertaining story.
hash_36e14a0f65d7cc1: ^1Scarlett: ^7We need to stay level-headed. If we just keep calm we'll get through this.
hash_376c55dd632b5fe: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in chance. This trinket was meant for me to find.
hash_376c65dd632b7b1: ^1Diego: ^7Perhaps this will prove useful. Perhaps it will ruin my pants.
hash_376c75dd632b964: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, yes! Of course! I need this. For later. I think.

hash_39425ac6dc8d20e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw really seems to be enjoying himself!     It'll be the rush of endorphins triggered by his fear of imminent death.
hash_39e36319f6ad5e1: ^1Shaw: ^7Slow down a little Bruno - We Don't want to flood the decks with blood, do we?
hash_39e37319f6ad794: ^1Diego: ^7You can stop hitting them now, Bruno... I'm pretty sure they are dead.
hash_39e39319f6adafa: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey Bruno? Did you do this kind of thing when you hung out with my father?!

hash_3ce9245f7185e8a: ^1Bruno: ^7I think they may be bored by your Tall Tales, Diego. They want flesh.
hash_3f1a2c332d90b8a: ÓĚ≠®Ďeņ4FžėK◊Żj tĚI īßY ŠŇŲE-ÍĎeņ4FNćňUxz 1ēā`ČÄ5yĀą#™ųPsäĚŕA¶ĖAŰ…^1Diego: ^7I wear my heart on my sleeve - can you see it beating with excitement and joy?

hash_3f244f932fc7398: ^1Diego: ^7I wear my heart on my sleeve - can you see it beating with excitement and joy?
hash_3f245f932fc754b: ^1Bruno: ^7Never did I think I would live to see such lightweight alternative to the Gatling gun.
hash_3f24bf932fc7f7d: ^1Shaw: ^7Last time I held a gun like this, I accidentally shot a Prussian Musketeer right in the goolies.     His wife was very upset.
hash_3f5f789406431f9: ^1Diego: ^7You'll need more fire than that to take down Diego Necalli.
hash_3f5f889406433ac: ^1Shaw: ^7I say, is that an intentional chemical reaction? Or just zombie heartburn?
hash_4db16a56a927498: ^1Diego: ^7Reminds me of the firebombs we used in the revolution. We called them 'Necalli cocktails,' heh.
hash_4db17a56a92764b: ^1Bruno: ^7Arhh! Do not let any of the glowing ones get close!
hash_4db18a56a9277fe: ^1Scarlett: ^7Better gun down the fire-guys on sight, or we'll all go up in smoke.
hash_4db1da56a92807d: ^1Shaw: ^7Steer clear of the hot ones! They pop like overcooked bangers!
hash_4fc2e3a94d15721: ^1Shaw: ^7I honestly don't think I've ever been this ANGRY and HAPPY at the same time.
hash_4fc2f3a94d158d4: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, we are only just getting started, bestias!
hash_4fc303a94d15a87: ^1Bruno: ^7I nearly always kill without mercy.     Nearly.
hash_4fc313a94d15c3a: ^1Scarlett: ^7I will kill each and everyone of you dead-brain fucks with my fingernails if I have to!
hash_4fe2d5a980c26b6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Appreciate that Bruno, but I'm not sure I'm a great believer in either of those things.      Let's just do what we need to in order to survive.
hash_589750fbf0ec7c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7WHAT THE...  (takes a breath)  Everyone okay?   (drifting)  Nothing... bitten off?
hash_5afc81ff9d4296b: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't understand - Is everything on sale because the ship is sinking?
hash_5afcb1ff9d42e84: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm coming for you bone-basket - and I want at least three
hash_5afcd1ff9d431ea: ^1Diego: ^7This offer had better not be a 'poisoned chalice' la fantasma!
hash_5afce1ff9d4339d: ^1Bruno: ^7Be wary - There is a reason the meat from the butcher costs more than meat from the man in the alley.
hash_5afdfd8798058a0: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's a SURE-FIRE WAY to PISS ME OFF!
hash_5afe1d879805c06: ^1Diego: ^7¬°Mis ojos! ¬°Mis orejas! My fourth and fifth favorite senses!
hash_5afe2d879805db9: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde! Feels like lightning shot in my eyes and out my ears...!
hash_5d62dd937d3c874: ^1Scarlett: ^7Remember when you tried to build me a tree house, 'Uncle Stan'? Now we're even.
hash_5d62fd937d3cbda: ^1Diego: ^7In Mexico, when you save someone, you become your responsibility.    I kid. I kid! Don't look so panicked, amigo.
hash_5d630d937d3cd8d: ^1Bruno: ^7So. I owe my life to a... a... how you say? 'Degenerate'...?
hash_5d67b7ffbd768d6: ^1Bruno: ^7As only a fool would dare provoke me, you must be such a fool.
hash_5d67c7ffbd76a89: ^1Diego: ^7You thought you could kill me? How foolish.
hash_5d67d7ffbd76c3c: ^1Shaw: ^7An eye for an eye! Let's not bother with the part about teeth.
hash_5e18202d671e4e6: ^1Shaw: ^7Strewth! How much gunpowder in packed in this thing?!
hash_5e18502d671e9ff: ^1Diego: ^7You know you are my favorite, Dragon.
hash_6067eee1b51229b: ^1Bruno: ^7France's national hero was known as 'the Hammer.'     This has nothing to do with the situation at hand.
hash_615eefab4aba699: ^1Shaw: ^7I want off this ship. Is this going to help me achieve that goal?    Maybe. Maybe not.
hash_615effab4aba84c: ^1Diego: ^7Even a blind man - or a clumsy man -  could not fail to hit something with this.
hash_615f0fab4aba9ff: ^1Bruno: ^7It is only a matter of time before these become commonplace on the black market.
hash_615f1fab4ababb2: ^1Scarlett: ^7I could take this apart to see how it works. Don't know if I could put it back together, though...
hash_6ab13782d9ca1d9: ^1Shaw: ^7When did you leave all this lying around, Scarlett?
hash_6ab14782d9ca38c: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett seems very proud of this thing - I'll reserve judgment until I see it in action.
hash_6ab15782d9ca53f: ^1Bruno: ^7A piece of Mademoiselle's gear. Hopefully it lives up to the stories.
hash_6ab16782d9ca6f2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I was looking for. This could literally save my ass.
hash_6c9916c4ce53016: ^1Diego: ^7I dedicate that shot to my one truly love.
hash_6c9926c4ce531c9: ^1Bruno: ^7I could have tormented you further, monstre. But I chose not to.
hash_6c9946c4ce5352f: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm surprised my hands are that steady today. Normally, I can barely even hold a beaker without spilling something.
hash_6ff66cde0746a88: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've heard the French lifestyle moves at a slower place, but would you hurry up and kill them already?!
hash_71b3854220c8490: ^1Bruno: ^7I've known many arrogant men.    Ultimately, it was their undoing.
hash_71b3b54220c89a9: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the fuck happened to 'The Great Diego Necalli never makes mistakes'?
hash_71b3e54220c8ec2: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful, Diego - I think they're salivating even more than usual.
hash_73e6fa2620e3996: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't want to jinx it, but I think I'm getting good at the whole fighting for survival thing.
hash_73e71a2620e3cfc: ^1Bruno: ^7Of all the deaths caused by my hand - yours was most deserved!
hash_73e72a2620e3eaf: ^1Diego: ^7If you are surprised by this bloodshed, you have surely not heard of my trip to Shanghai.
hash_73e74a2620e4215: ^1Scarlett: ^7You don't want to know how much worse I could hurt you.
hash_7593a2ebe8fc0b3: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to the Forecastle
hash_75c982563114720: ^1Diego: ^7What sort payment do you need, inanimate object?
hash_75c9925631148d3: ^1Bruno: ^7No' is not a word that I respond to kindly.
hash_75c9a2563114a86: ^1Scarlett: ^7I know, I know, 'come back when you can cough up more cash.'     Assholes.
hash_75c9f2563115305: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't say I encountered this phenomenon in Cambodia. Though my pockets were just as empty then as they are now.
hash_76a5939d9150d3e: ^1Shaw: ^7HANG ON!??     Iceberg! - We just collided with a bloody great iceberg!
hash_776aaa3bfa95e56: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh. Nutty. I've only honestly forgotten some of the recipes.
hash_776aca3bfa961bc: ^1Bruno: ^7Mix that with a Merlot and you may have something more palatable.
hash_776ada3bfa9636f: ^1Diego: ^7Madero had a German Doctor who made concoctions like this. His tasted better.
hash_792ceb5d5e39386: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I just had an out-of-body experience. Much better than an out -of-medication experience...
hash_792d1b5d5e3989f: ^1Diego: ^7I would hug you, senor Delacroix, but I have no wish to toy with your emotions.
hash_792d3b5d5e39c05: ^1Scarlett: ^7I let my guard down, big guy. I won't do it again.
hash_79743ea364ed3f8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I assume you already killed the ones who did this to you?
hash_79745ea364ed75e: ^1Diego: ^7I look forward to hearing about the giant who overpowered you.
hash_79748ea364edc77: ^1Shaw: ^7We all need a little helping hand now and again... I give myself one fairly regularly.
hash_7b0f621e22e376d: ^1Bruno: ^7So Monsieur Science. Do you have an explanation for the horrors unfolding around us?
hash_7cdb723dcc75e10: ^1Bruno: ^7I felt my body turn inside out...     Was everything outside put back in?!
hash_7cdb823dcc75fc3: ^1Diego: ^7Maldito sea! I just felt my organs outside my body.
hash_7cdba23dcc76329: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the hell happened? Am I still in one piece?
hash_7cdbd23dcc76842: ^1Shaw: ^7The artifact is capable of somehow inducing teleportation! Wonderful!
hash_7e1cd3bfb166661: ^1Shaw: ^7It exploded! Shame, I was hoping to examine his remains.
hash_807678757f9bc10: ^1Scarlett: ^7A gun from a wall. That's...that's just...     Okay, Scarlett, don't over-think it, just take the damn gun.
hash_807698757f9bf76: ^1Diego: ^7This is bizarre. And I know bizarre  -- I have dated Americans.
hash_8076a8757f9c129: ^1Bruno: ^7This ship is cursed. And so am I.
hash_8076c8757f9c48f: ^1Shaw: ^7Either I've gone barmy, or this wall has. My money's on the wall.    Literally.
hash_80e157dab1e06e2: ^1Diego: ^7The range on this thing is awe-inspiring.
hash_80e167dab1e0895: ^1Bruno: ^7Express train to Hell! Let me punch your ticket!

hash_84d8f40ff2c84e3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw seems particularly giddy right now.     That is somewhat concerning.
hash_84d9040ff2c8696: ^1Bruno: ^7I was going to offer my help, Shaw - but I see you have the situation under control.
hash_84d9140ff2c8849: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw! Have you taken too much of something?
hash_84fa5a080f5d150: ^1Shaw: ^7Handle myself? Handle myself??! What are you insinuating?!!     I am more than capple-able.

hash_88cd06cc28d9928: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened to your balls, Bruno? They seem to have vanished altogether.
hash_88cd26cc28d9c8e: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes! Lure them close, Bruno - That way you can really savor the pain on their faces.
hash_88cd56cc28da1a7: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on, lad! Put on a proper show! Start Swinging! Fuck the Marquess of Queensberry!
hash_891ea7fcd7523e2: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, Diego... Things aren't looking too promising for you.
hash_897263622b4bcc0: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe Shaw can clean up whatever is left after boom...
hash_897273622b4be73: ^1Diego: ^7Very effective, but it does make something of a mess.
hash_897293622b4c1d9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aside from a few wet lumps, that's probably the last I'll see of them.
hash_8972c3622b4c6f2: ^1Shaw: ^7Could use a sprinkle more of Trinitroanisole, I think.
hash_8a27940f8577109: ^1Shaw: ^7Where are my organs? Why can I only feel one kidney?... Oh right, there's only one.
hash_94a994c932d00e6: ^1Shaw: ^7Free money? No such thing! Even if you do receive sponsorship, they probably want something from you.
hash_94a9b4c932d044c: ^1Bruno: ^7When my former boss gave me extra pay, it usually meant an impossible task was in my near future.
hash_94a9c4c932d05ff: ^1Diego: ^7I cannot be bribed! I will take your gold, but give you nothing in return.
hash_970f7b2c2866039: ^1Diego: ^7Lo siento, but that is what you get when you do not exfoliate!
hash_9717622c503b116: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right - Don't worry about me!      I'll just save my own skin.
hash_9717b22c503b995: ^1Shaw: ^7Okay, enough time sitting on my arse. Better get back to the grind.
hash_97e6dcd19dd6880: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, I'll take this. Keep it coming.
hash_97e6ecd19dd6a33: ^1Bruno: ^7A hole in the wall. Payment goes in, contraband come out. Seems familiar...    ...what the Americans would call a 'speakeasy.'
hash_97e6fcd19dd6be6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Thanks for the gun. I'll figure you out later, wall.
hash_97e74cd19dd7465: ^1Shaw: ^7If these walls could speak, they'd say, 'Don't shoot it all in one place, fellas!'
hash_984ef94860d51d3: ^1Shaw: ^7On second thought... no. This just isn't for me. Anybody want this?
hash_984f494860d5a52: ^1Diego: ^7Anyone want this? It clashes with my entire outfit.
hash_984f594860d5c05: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not want this.    Who wants this?
hash_9a05ec40f7ee18e: ^1Scarlett: ^7So...we have to kill ghouls to earn points to buy stuff to kill more ghouls.      I call bull.

hash_9f416b2103b48d3: ^1Bruno: ^7Even though I do not believe in her - It seems Lady Luck is on my side.
hash_9f41cb2103b5305: ^1Shaw: ^7I think you should know, I bear you no ill will. I'm just going along with everyone else.

hash_b1fbcb24dea5711: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're lucky I made it quick. I was thinking of doing something really nasty
hash_b1fbfb24dea5c2a: ^1Shaw: ^7Thought I'd forgotten about you didn't you? Sometimes you just have to be patient.
hash_b3a18d618a14dfe: ^1Shaw: ^7The wall can spontaneously generate ammo *directly* into a confined, in-motion space *within* my weapon.    That's bonkers, frankly..
hash_b3a1ad618a15164: ^1Bruno: ^7I am in no mood to haggle.
hash_b3a1bd618a15317: ^1Diego: ^7Muchas gracias. The belly of my starving gun is full once more.
hash_b3a1dd618a1567d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I suppose if the walls can give me guns, it makes sense that they can also give me bullets...

hash_b47fd119cb667f6: ^1Bruno: ^7This vapor is a bit strong - even for me.

hash_b772cc767d922e2: ^1Diego: ^7It is only right - after all, have I not sated your cravings, fantasma?
hash_b772dc767d92495: ^1Bruno: ^7There was a time in my life when I would have been grateful for such scraps.     This is not that time.

hash_c4e8cd064545546: ^1Bruno: ^7Never look a gift horse in the mouth, never look a gift gun in the wall. Simple as that.
hash_c4e8dd0645456f9: ^1Diego: ^7All of this connects to my family. The only question is, 'how?'
hash_c4e8ed0645458ac: ^1Shaw: ^7So we've been given enemies and a means to destroy them. Is the Man Upstairs just having a laugh?

hash_c810a774f4060dc: ^1Shaw: ^7The Scepter of Ra feels ready to use.
hash_cb8815af91bfea1: ^1Shaw: ^7Useless! Like a chocolate prophylactic! No wait. I meant fire-guard. Chocolate fireguard.
hash_cb8825af91c0054: ^1Diego: ^7Perhaps I have not wooed you enough  machina.    Tell me - What can I do for you.

hash_ccd6a1cda3279f3: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! This weapon just  became considerably more heavy.     Oh, I see - it's full of bullet now!

hash_ccd6f1cda328272: ^1Diego: ^7I would hope that such supplies become... commonplace.
hash_ccd701cda328425: ^1Bruno: ^7If only La Legion were as generous with their supplies.

hash_dd3dfe05bde5041: ^1Diego: ^7This day will pass into legend - Another chapter in a life lived to glorious excess.
hash_dd3e0e05bde51f4: ^1Shaw: ^7I've actually seen the afterlife - and there wasn't anyone walking around all flaky and bony.
hash_e13f5b64750ef5b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wonder how fast it eats through rounds?
hash_e13f6b64750f10e: ^1Bruno: ^7Where do you find these weapons, boite?
hash_e13f7b64750f2c1: ^1Diego: ^7I proved in Portugal that more bullets do not guarantee victory. For once, I was the one with less.
hash_e13f8b64750f474: ^1Shaw: ^7This weapon looks rather smart. Maybe later models won't even require an operator.
hash_e3d1690d7d7f44e: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to the Forecastle. [Cost: &&1]
hash_e58f17da8c15994: ^1Scarlett: ^7You swing a mean shovel, but, you know...it's just a shovel.
hash_eed415a6dcb74a7: ^1Bruno: ^7I am no stranger to blood. I have bathed in it so deeply that I once feared I might drown.     But please, empty your stomach if it makes you feel better.
hash_efac2c2c658e116: ^1Shaw: ^7I could probably shoot myself in the head with this and not feel a thing...
hash_efac4c2c658e47c: ^1Bruno: ^7Do you not at least have a revolver?
hash_efac5c2c658e62f: ^1Diego: ^7Hey! I thought we were amigos! Instead you offer me Baratijas!
hash_efac7c2c658e995: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm tempted to put my boot right through you.
hash_f2d2237703bf808: ^1Diego: ^7Can no one else carry this? I worry it may create an inappropriate bulge in outfit.
hash_f2d2337703bf9bb: ^1Bruno: ^7A hidden treasure. I shall keep it safe from harm.
hash_f2d2437703bfb6e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh look. More junk for my garage.
hash_f2d2937703c03ed: ^1Shaw: ^7So you have a role to play in this game? As do I, little trinket, as do I.
hash_f3ff5db578adcd9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Even if he did send an SOS, rescue won't reach us in time.      We're on our own, so be useful. If you can't be useful - go for a swim.
hash_f6a44df421be4c6: ^1Bruno: ^7Even a rifle such as this may not be enough.

hash_ff6544d651fa50f: ^1Diego: ^7As usual, I am the eye of the storm.
hash_1004c56ea422557d: ^1Bruno: ^7You are a generous man, Diego. Giving away such an object. One capable of destroying all that it touches.    I will watch my own back.
hash_102401a80ff07a96: ^1Bruno: ^7Must I shoot you to pieces and then shoot the pieces?
hash_102402a80ff07c49: ^1Diego: ^7Now you are just making a mess.
hash_102403a80ff07dfc: ^1Shaw: ^7That's poor play! Why aren't you dead? Is the missing arm not enough of a hint?
hash_10259310a9a2558b: ^1Diego: ^7Ah. Rescued by a woman. How thoroughly modern of both of us.But especially me.
hash_10259810a9a25e0a: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you see which one got me? All I saw was the floor rising up to smack my head.
hash_1061eb2ef0170798: ^1Shaw: ^7Have I mentioned Prima Materia? I'm sure I have.     It's everything. Or nothing. Or both.
hash_1061f02ef0171017: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't know how we're going to survive this, but if we do - I'm going to hunt down every one of these lunatics, and find my father.
hash_1061f12ef01711ca: ^1Bruno: ^7All of this must have purpose. I know this. I feel it. Deep within.
hash_1061f22ef017137d: ^1Diego: ^7My Medallion - a family heirloom - somehow unleashed this chaos...     Should I be concerned about a curse?
hash_1068321d851d0818: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you had any sense, you'd beat it before you lose something.
hash_1068341d851d0b7e: ^1Diego: ^7You will have to try harder than that. A lot harder.
hash_1068351d851d0d31: ^1Bruno: ^7I ensure you do not live long enough to do that again.
hash_1068371d851d1097: ^1Shaw: ^7That would have hurt a lot more if I wasn't on the right medication.
hash_106c4e9207ddd036: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, I suppose even a broke rock is clock twice a day.
hash_106c509207ddd39c: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in luck. We make our own fortune.
hash_106c539207ddd8b5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Something good happened. Let's crack open the champagne.      ON SOME DEAD-BRAIN SKULLS!
hash_108084f0b6fe1700: ^1Diego: ^7Your ship... has sailed - on to the ragged rocks.
hash_108085f0b6fe18b3: ^1Bruno: ^7I can never allow my full rage to be unleashed.
hash_108086f0b6fe1a66: ^1Scarlett: ^7This whole damn day's gotten crazy.   I'm just rising to the fucking occasion.
hash_10808bf0b6fe22e5: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't know if this is what they call a natural high, but I am absolutely buzzing right now!

hash_1b8956a56ef1f7e3: ^1Shaw: ^7I remember that night at Ah Sing's - Blotto Benny started playing around with one of these. He recovered well - despite the no face thing.
hash_1b895ba56ef20062: ^1Diego: ^7Sooo Noisy! My greatest fear is that I may one day lose my ability to listen.
hash_1b895ca56ef20215: ^1Bruno: ^7At close range, this could shatter a skull.
hash_1b989c29e432b4e1: ^1Shaw: ^7I should really know what's in this. I did create it after all.
hash_1b989e29e432b847: ^1Bruno: ^7Who knew chemistry and alchemy could result in such powerful elixirs.
hash_1b989f29e432b9fa: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know what Shaw mixes these with to add flavor, but he should add more.
hash_1ba33d03909e1158: ^1Scarlett: ^7Nice shot, but it's starting to get a little busy for taking them down one at a time!
hash_1ba34003909e1671: ^1Bruno: ^7Another minor - perhaps insignificant - triumph for Diego Necalli!
hash_1ba34203909e19d7: ^1Shaw: ^7Deigo - Imagine if any of your lovers actually knew the nasty things you got up to...?
hash_1bc42a9b18d8c9c0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, I can feel that, alright. My heart's pumping like a steam train.
hash_1bc42c9b18d8cd26: ^1Diego: ^7Well... At least my sinuses are now completely clear.
hash_1bc42d9b18d8ced9: ^1Bruno: ^7I visited a Hookah House in Morocco - more than once.    It was not like this.
hash_1bc42f9b18d8d23f: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not sure this one's even working.     I just feel... normal.

hash_1c162f9eaf1a6203: ^1Shaw: ^7Any chance the Great Beyond assist me with more ammo?? I know you can hear me!
hash_1c16329eaf1a671c: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm going to need more ammo a lot sooner than I'd like.
hash_1c16349eaf1a6a82: ^1Diego: ^7I am short on ammo, I may have to get... creative.
hash_1c1bf96d549d3cb0: ^1Shaw: ^7You must be *this* tall to ride this ship!
hash_1c1bfe6d549d452f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why wait 'til they get close? This thing's got range!
hash_1c1bff6d549d46e2: ^1Bruno: ^7I have had to whip soldiers before, but this would leave nothing but blood.
hash_1c1c006d549d4895: ^1Diego: ^7So, Viper, what are you doing after this?
hash_1c427b5b82e2c091: ^1Shaw: ^7I should keep this. Just in case we run into a real emergency.
hash_1c427c5b82e2c244: ^1Diego: ^7I am aware that this may ruin the lining of my pantalones, but I will keep it nonetheless.
hash_1c427d5b82e2c3f7: ^1Bruno: ^7If it has no purpose, then perhaps I will fashion it into a weapon.
hash_1c427e5b82e2c5aa: ^1Scarlett: ^7With vision, you can make something out of anything. Even this... thing.
hash_1c4f3b75994bb430: ^1Diego: ^7My ancestors worshipped the sun. Now I see why.
hash_1c4f3c75994bb5e3: ^1Bruno: ^7If I turned this on myself, would it cure my guilt?
hash_1c4f4275994bc015: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, that's one way to burn out an infection.
hash_1ce117f33a79297b: ^1Scarlett: ^7FUCK ME! A blast like that could burn the whole damn ship down!
hash_1ce118f33a792b2e: ^1Bruno: ^7If you do not burn, monstres - I will stand over you to fan the flames.
hash_1ce119f33a792ce1: ^1Diego: ^7I think I just solved all our problems!     At least until more come our way.
hash_1ce11af33a792e94: ^1Shaw: ^7What in the heavens was that? Am I on fire??
hash_1cfd3600cb62bf40: ^1Scarlett: ^7The Scepter feels different -- power level's stepped up.
hash_1cfd3800cb62c2a6: ^1Diego: ^7Strange. The Scepter of Ra feels more charged up than before.
hash_1cfd3900cb62c459: ^1Bruno: ^7The Scepter hums with power. But it feels...different this time.
hash_1cfd3b00cb62c7bf: ^1Shaw: ^7Feels like the Scepter is ready to shine.
hash_1d03678b1510cdb3: ^1Shaw: ^7What the Hell was that?! Did someone just cut a fucking atom in half?
hash_1d036c8b1510d632: ^1Diego: ^7They are all dead?     Even my blade is not so swift.

hash_1e0b4f5df264f134: ^1Narrator: ^7Let's talk about 'perks.'   They come in many varieties, and each grants you an additional ability.
hash_1e19163fae243d70: ^1Shaw: ^7You can't ALL be hungry, can you?
hash_1e191c3fae2447a2: ^1Bruno: ^7This is a gun fight, and you only brought your teeth.
hash_1e191d3fae244955: ^1Diego: ^7My list of conquests is long. You will make fine additions.
hash_1e23268d0b95a23c: ^1Scarlett: ^7That shield probably saved me more times than I realize.
hash_1e82c3a2db8d9f00: ^1Shaw: ^7Based on past experience, these boards will do little to hold back the undead.    They can be very persistent.
hash_1e82c8a2db8da77f: ^1Scarlett: ^7At first, everything on this ship was finely crafted... Those days are gone, baby.
hash_1e82c9a2db8da932: ^1Bruno: ^7We should control their avenues of attack, and funnel them into a kill zone.
hash_1e82caa2db8daae5: ^1Diego: ^7I fear there is not enough wood in the world to hold back this horde...
hash_1ef5b9a961cf68ae: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, Monsieur DeLaCrotch - I actually do mind you enquiring.     Besides - LOOK AT WHAT'S HAPPENING RIGHT NOW!!!
hash_1f30c768df17459b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Lack of legs sure doesn't slow them down much...!
hash_1f30c968df174901: ^1Diego: ^7The dedication to your cause is admirable. We could have used men like you in Mexico.     Butm you know... alive.
hash_1f3d1bba2d57a55d: ^1Scarlett: ^7There was definitely nothing about fighting a gargantuan eyeball anywhere in Dad's letter!
hash_1fac9300dfb546e4: ^1Narrator: ^7You'll earn points for every zombie you kill.   Head shots and Melee kills and grant you bonus points.
hash_1fafce695de02fbe: ^1Bruno: ^7You are an angel, Scarlett. A foul-mouthed angel, but nevertheless...
hash_1fafcf695de03171: ^1Diego: ^7What you must realize, senorita, is that getting injured was part of my plan.
hash_1fafd0695de03324: ^1Shaw: ^7I was just about to drift into that heavenly light...     ...or maybe that's just a migraine coming on.
hash_1fbf90b4e33dd110: ^1Shaw: ^7That's perfect. I'll use it as back up if I run out of small stones and pebbles.
hash_1fbf96b4e33ddb42: ^1Bruno: ^7Even the weakest soldier in the Legion would scoff at such a puny weapon.
hash_1fbf97b4e33ddcf5: ^1Diego: ^7Pah! Pistols belong in the hands of federales posing for photographs.
hash_1fe854f6441b337e: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to pick up Concentrated Decay
hash_1fee0c209c43286b: ^1Shaw: ^7A lot better than the job I did on last year's turkey.
hash_1fee0f209c432d84: ^1Scarlett: ^7Stay down.     Or I'll kill you again.
hash_1fee11209c4330ea: ^1Diego: ^7Like a knife through the heart!    Literally.
hash_1fefdef37106d2e0: ^1Diego: ^7The Great Diego Necalli does not know defeat!    Well, except perhaps for that one time...
hash_1fefdff37106d493: ^1Bruno: ^7I get angry when I do not get what I want. Consider that a warning.
hash_1fefe5f37106dec5: ^1Shaw: ^7Curious... The machine modulates at the molecular level, creating a chemical implosion!    But... why? It's very inconvenient.

hash_20808d56425cddcb: ^1Shaw: ^7I'd like to inspect these 'modifications' more thoroughly -  But I am awfully busy trying not to be murdered.
hash_20809056425ce2e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm genuinely at loss to explain how these modifications can be made so quickly...
hash_20809256425ce64a: ^1Diego: ^7I have seem many strange and twisted things today... This is one of the few I have liked.
hash_20809356425ce7fd: ^1Bruno: ^7As I soldier, I know better than to turn down supplies - no matter where they may have come from.
hash_2092a6eb69da01b0: ^1Shaw: ^7Let's play a game, shall we? It's called 'bangers and mash.'
hash_2092aceb69da0be2: ^1Bruno: ^7I am Judge Bruno. This is my gavel. The sentence is death.
hash_2092adeb69da0d95: ^1Diego: ^7Come. Let us hammer out our differences.
hash_20ca8296044abb98: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like the Chakram's good to go.
hash_20ca8496044abefe: ^1Diego: ^7The Blades of Vengeance are sharp. And ready to use.
hash_20ca8596044ac0b1: ^1Bruno: ^7This Chakram wishes for vengeance. I wonder what for.
hash_20ca8796044ac417: ^1Shaw: ^7Got to try out my chakram thingie...
hash_20ded28c59c6688a: ^1Narrator: ^7With the Sentinel Artifact activated, you'll notice some changes, like additional paths opening up.
hash_21084731511b478b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Gas is...messing with my head...can't think straight.
hash_2129683a565994b3: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've saw prototypes of these. Didn't know they'd made it to production.
hash_2129693a56599666: ^1Bruno: ^7Used properly, this weapon is deadly. Used poorly? A little less deadly.
hash_21296a3a56599819: ^1Diego: ^7You are very compact. I like how all your best features are positioned so close together.
hash_21296b3a565999cc: ^1Shaw: ^7Between my shaky hands and this firearm's considerable kick... It might be a good idea to stand well clear.
hash_21593e09661609ad: ^1Scarlett: ^7What are you twisting into now, bone box?!
hash_21d65ef02469fb36: ^1Shaw: ^7So much blood.     I can't stand it.     Honestly, it makes me want to puke my lungs up.
hash_21ef8fd9890914a9: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno, my friend! It is clear you are a formidable fighter. I suggest we team up - to ensure our *mutual* survival.
hash_221f6100306b31e0: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody hell! Think I blew out an ear drum!
hash_221f6600306b3a5f: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's like a pistol and a shotgun had a baby that fires grenades!
hash_221f6800306b3dc5: ^1Diego: ^7I enjoy our time together, Dragon. Do not tell your sister.
hash_224468183fc02d71: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to Provisions
hash_2250366c8d91909a: ^1Shaw: ^7Thank you. I am - after all - working up a sweat over here...     Wait, is that sweat? What am I secreting?
hash_225c691a4cc0f596: ^1Diego: ^7I can honestly say - I have never seen such a ferocious Senorita.
hash_225c6a1a4cc0f749: ^1Bruno: ^7I recognize that look, Scarlett. You're angry, but you don't want to show it.
hash_225c6c1a4cc0faaf: ^1Shaw: ^7That's right girl - NO MERCY! None. Not even a teeny-weeny bit.
hash_229651b097292334: Press [{+activate}] to convert to Decay Ammo
hash_22fd2373769eb158: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't feel my legs! Are they gone?? Oh wait, there they are.
hash_2301add833ac92ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw - My father's letter implied that you 'might' have some understanding of just *what* is happening here.
hash_2311a3e56a801e98: ^1Diego: ^7Mmmm...If I were a woman, I'd like to think I'd be that kind of woman.
hash_2311a4e56a80204b: ^1Bruno: ^7When this is over, perhaps you would like to join the Legion?
hash_2311aae56a802a7d: ^1Shaw: ^7I saw that, Scarlett. Your Dad would be very proud.     Not that he dreamed of you growing up to shoot monsters in head.
hash_2331b3f5f39d34ad: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4F ćŖ[Ż 1UB`…™< ąā/ų”R8ú•a`Ćųaz°;\aŖ)  a good thing.
hash_2358d012e968297b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sooner or later, we all get knocked down. All you can do is get back up.
hash_237681e6d7466e80: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is going to come to an end. I feel. Things are happening.
hash_237683e6d74671e6: ^1Diego: ^7It saddens me to think that I do not once recall Alistair speaking of his daughter...
hash_237684e6d7467399: ^1Bruno: ^7There is something within me. Something I do not understand.
hash_237686e6d74676ff: ^1Shaw: ^7You won't recognize the symptoms because of the symptoms -      Short term memory. Long term memory.
hash_237b1faac3ffcdb3: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't lash out at me in anger if this hurts a bit, okay?
hash_237b22aac3ffd2cc: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, big boy! We need you back on your feet.
hash_237b24aac3ffd632: ^1Diego: ^7Fear not, amigo. I will not tell the others of your failure.     It will be our secret.
hash_237ef714e9e9f32e: ^1Diego: ^7And that is the last we see of that thing.    ...Right?
hash_238745bfaad3e7e8: ^1Diego: ^7If I have learned anything from my work... it is that 'no one' gives help for free.
hash_238746bfaad3e99b: ^1Bruno: ^7Reluctant as I am to accept, this reward may help us achieve our goals.
hash_238747bfaad3eb4e: ^1Scarlett: ^7The Sun may not be shining, but let's make hay all the same.
hash_23874cbfaad3f3cd: ^1Shaw: ^7Everyone else hears that, right? It's not just me is it?     No! I hear it too!
hash_23c7b230c883e1f9: ^1Narrator: ^7The weapon on the wall can be all yours... in exchange for some of your points. Points are your currency.
hash_23cd1b4232fd9e9f: ^1Narrator: ^7Hurry on over to that Chaos orb. Big flaming orb. You can't miss it.
hash_241e7b00d2049288: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's hard to know what's explanation, and what's the deluded ramblings of an unravelling mind.      He's a lot like Shaw in that respect.
hash_242dfa0baddd4df6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't like unfinished business. Never have.
hash_242dff0baddd5675: ^1Shaw: ^7Thought you could walk all over me, didn't you?
hash_242fa3024421fcef: ^1Diego: ^7This is one escapade I will not be bragging about.
hash_242fa50244220055: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hope we all learned something from this.
hash_24521a8a2f1ade25: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keeping score?!      You bet I'm keeping score.
hash_245c2a66194975da: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've got good news you dead-brain-freaks! The bounty on you just doubled.
hash_246bf6524405345e: ^1Bruno: ^7I promise, whoever turned you into a coal-golem will pay.
hash_246bf75244053611: ^1Diego: ^7The stoker is gone...but his stench lives on.
hash_246bf852440537c4: ^1Shaw: ^7Hook it back to the hell you rose from!
hash_247f3be8cd7e7329: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm all for attacking indiscriminately - So long as you don't include me.
hash_247f3ce8cd7e74dc: ^1Diego: ^7The creature seems to be releasing a lot of pent up aggression.
hash_247f3de8cd7e768f: ^1Bruno: ^7I have seen such violence only a few times before.     It was me doing the violence.
hash_247f3ee8cd7e7842: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not sure what I was expecting to happen... but, uh - not that.
hash_24a392b409802059: ^1Shaw: ^7With Bruno popping heads left right and center I could probably give myself a little break...
hash_24a393b40980220c: ^1Diego: ^7Even when you nail a headshot you still sound depressed.
hash_24a395b409802572: ^1Scarlett: ^7You ever take part in a firing squad, Bruno?
hash_24c278f51817e8f6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've heard the French lifestyle moves at a slower place, but would you hurry the fuck up and kill them already?!
hash_24c27df51817f175: ^1Shaw: ^7This is your chance to give them a proper hiding - Go in for the kill!
hash_24d4004d6255a7a2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not that I'm keeping count, Bruno - but that was a LOT of butt kicking in a very short time!
hash_2504e1e513b6362e: ^1Shaw: ^7Do not worry, Diego. I am more than capable of saving you. I could even do the kiss of life if I had to!
hash_2504e3e513b63994: ^1Bruno: ^7I could just leave you here to die. But that would be much bigger lesson than you need learn.

hash_25db92a5adbd2ed7: ^1Diego: ^7The ocean air is not for everyone, mi amigo.
hash_25db94a5adbd323d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Now you know what it's like to look at your pug-ugly freak-face all night!
hash_265b0b5396be15e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just help me up and skip the life lesson, Shaw.
hash_265b0d5396be1946: ^1Diego: ^7That better not have been your 'special medicine,' Chemist.
hash_265b0e5396be1af9: ^1Bruno: ^7Tell me that needle was clean, Chemist.
hash_26834d61b63e2bc9: ^1Shaw: ^7Another bloke with a shovel. I hope everyone likes fireballs.

hash_26f0dde2cbf42dd8: ^1Shaw: ^7...just got to be careful not to hit my thumb... OWWWW!
hash_26fe95364d568e0b: ^1Narrator: ^7Oh, wait - there is some bad news...  You're definitely going to die at some point. That's how every Zombies game ends. Just make those flesh-eaters work for it.
hash_275bf6af489271e9: ^1Shaw: ^7That cheeky blue bastard is giving his a friends a leg up!
hash_275bf7af4892739c: ^1Diego: ^7Is that cuco de agua rejuvenating his friends?
hash_275bf8af4892754f: ^1Bruno: ^7Their eyes! That little blue rat is making them stronger!
hash_275bf9af48927702: ^1Scarlett: ^7...son-of-a-bitch. That sneaky little shit is healing the others!
hash_276a6eaf9168a0a3: ^1Narrator: ^7Welcome! Time to learn what's new for Zombies Mode in Black Ops 4.
hash_27ae15a285070da0: ^1Narrator: ^7All right, now it's time to activate the Sentinel Artifact.
hash_27f664afa210c731: ^1Shaw: ^7From a solid to a liquid! That's chemistry for ya.
hash_27f665afa210c8e4: ^1Diego: ^7So, are you a shotgun or a pistol? Either is fine, just curious how you identify.
hash_27f666afa210ca97: ^1Bruno: ^7At last, a pistol that fits my hand.
hash_282de740ba6f0b4d: ^1Bruno: ^7We should not be down here, The Eye may gain the advantage from higher ground!
hash_28309a80ff79f6f8: ^1Narrator: ^7Now let's learn how to upgrade your weapon. The Pack A Punch Altar is highlighted just ahead of you.

hash_2840895c5c26a4a4: ^1Diego: ^7Usually, it is me who gets hammered, but this is good, too.
hash_28408b5c5c26a80a: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's not a problem a hammer can't solve!
hash_28e324db2fee2eb0: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can hold my own - This is just gravy.
hash_28e326db2fee3216: ^1Diego: ^7This almost takes away from the thrill of the hunt - am I right?
hash_28e327db2fee33c9: ^1Bruno: ^7Much as I try to avoid violence, it will not let me go.
hash_28e329db2fee372f: ^1Shaw: ^7The Great Beyond - I'm calling it that by the way - provides us with a great, and terrible powers.
hash_293b6ad83f7b6337: ^1Bruno: ^7This is... Magique. Dark Magique.    Our situation is... dire.
hash_2983c63f07582ac0: ^1Narrator: ^7Uh-oh. Looks like this zombie's torn its way through your defenses. You'd better kill it.
hash_29942b066bec9a98: ^1Bruno: ^7This 'creature' possesses a rage beyond anything I have ever witnessed.
hash_29942c066bec9c4b: ^1Diego: ^7Do you think your unparalleled ugliness has held you back in life?
hash_29942e066bec9fb1: ^1Scarlett: ^7This little freak's angrier than bag of wasps!
hash_299431066beca4ca: ^1Shaw: ^7I get the feeling you could be very dangerous if you were in a 'normal' sized body.
hash_29b72f36c8ee8557: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to pick up Concentrated Radiance
hash_29fc78c7af283d96: ^1Diego: ^7Looks like we are in for another tongue-lashing.
hash_29fc79c7af283f49: ^1Bruno: ^7If I had that face, I would be angry, too.
hash_29fc7bc7af2842af: ^1Shaw: ^7How many of those bloody giants are there??
hash_2a0082c01f2ad96d: ^1Scarlett: ^7A blast like that could burn the whole flippin ship down!
hash_2a2992f097f3b138: ^1Bruno: ^7If needs be, I will punch my way to more ammunition.
hash_2a2993f097f3b2eb: ^1Diego: ^7Earlier, I may have... overestimated just how many bullets I had left.
hash_2a2995f097f3b651: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't like the sound of that click at all.
hash_2a2998f097f3bb6a: ^1Shaw: ^7Based on past experiences... fighting these creatures without ammunition is--    Unwise.
hash_2a4ec1b8b406d009: ^1Shaw: ^7Why does this rifle look like it should come with a really thick manual I will never bother reading.
hash_2a4ec2b8b406d1bc: ^1Diego: ^7A rifle that requires skill, and patience. Fortunately, I am blessed with an abundance of these traits.
hash_2a4ec4b8b406d522: ^1Scarlett: ^7I should really create a stabilizer for this. Reduce the sway.

hash_2a72a70985e9c0d8: ^1Diego: ^7We all need to work together if we are to get off this ship alive.
hash_2a72a80985e9c28b: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope this was not a cry for help, Shaw?
hash_2a72a90985e9c43e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Show me who hurt you, Shaw - I'll make sure they don't do it again.
hash_2a7339c74ec6d55b: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not even sure what happened there - One minute there were loads of them - the next, they're all gone!
hash_2a733cc74ec6da74: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see you, Deigo. You're very good at fighting. Well done.
hash_2a733fc74ec6df8d: ^1Bruno: ^7Don't be reckless, Mexicain - It is a very dangerous habit to get into.
hash_2a81aef1f6cbab5c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Drains the death right out of them.
hash_2a81b0f1f6cbaec2: ^1Diego: ^7Saint Diego Necalli gives you his blessing.
hash_2a81b1f1f6cbb075: ^1Bruno: ^7Better to light a candle than curse the darkness, right?
hash_2aaf16c14ba25bd4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Honestly? I didn't know things would get this bad, but I knew I'd probably need some muscle. Hence... You know... You.
hash_2b0a7eea7d5837b2: Forecastle to State Rooms Door Unlocked!
hash_2b5f7bf95ecbe331: ^1Shaw: ^7My services usually come at a premium. Today, I'll make an exception.
hash_2b5f7cf95ecbe4e4: ^1Diego: ^7Bribes are for those too weak willed to show the courage of their convictions.
hash_2b5f7df95ecbe697: ^1Bruno: ^7I am deeply suspicious of unexpected gifts from unknown parties.
hash_2bc3fbaefaa3b764: Lounge to Promenade Port Deck Door Unlocked!

hash_2bd155763d0f973b: ^1Bruno: ^7Smell is much like Butchers' Quarter by the docks. So many different kinds of meat...
hash_2bd156763d0f98ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn that's rough...      In all honesty, I'd rather lick piss off a nettle.
hash_2bd15b763d0fa16d: ^1Shaw: ^7A huff and a puff, and I'll blow their house down.

hash_2bddbe2650c4061e: ^1Shaw: ^7Maybe the fireman will be nicer this time...

hash_2bddc12650c40b37: ^1Diego: ^7Mi amigo con bolas de fuego! So good to see you again!
hash_2bfa6e4392e1c0b8: ^1Diego: ^7Forgive me poor, lost soul. I could not bear to gaze further upon your unappealing face.
hash_2bfa754392e1cc9d: ^1Shaw: ^7That was a mercy killing. A mercy for me - I couldn't stand another minute of your incessant squawking.
hash_2bfea8f115f9a143: ^1Diego: ^7Yay. Collecting random objects is far more thrilling than fighting monsters for survival.
hash_2bfeadf115f9a9c2: ^1Shaw: ^7I hope this does not spontaneously  combust.     That happens WAY more often than you'd like to think.

hash_2c30e1e8d5ac83ff: ^1Diego: ^7Dios Mio... Where on did you find this machina?
hash_2c30e3e8d5ac8765: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shouldn't waste this on loners -  Need a nice big group.
hash_2c33b04abf181370: ^1Shaw: ^7Red skies at night, sailor's delight. Red blood on my hammer...    Ah, fuck it, you're dead!
hash_2c33b64abf181da2: ^1Bruno: ^7All who brave the storm will suffer!
hash_2c33b74abf181f55: ^1Diego: ^7I am a hurricane. No -- a hammercane!
hash_2c472dd6696f1d51: ^1Shaw: ^7I've got an absolute BASTARD of a headache, and this banging isn't helping.
hash_2c472ed6696f1f04: ^1Diego: ^7I wish I could construct something a little more 'resilient' but we have neither the tools nor the time.
hash_2c472fd6696f20b7: ^1Bruno: ^7As defensive measures go, this may be the most ineffective I have ever seen.
hash_2c4730d6696f226a: ^1Scarlett: ^7I generally try to build things that don't fall apart within minutes!
hash_2c8e486f10ce0be6: ^1Bruno: ^7Stay calm, Scarlett - keep your head focussed... On their heads.
hash_2c8e496f10ce0d99: ^1Diego: ^7I'm trying to understand at what point in your life you learned to fight like that...
hash_2c8e4a6f10ce0f4c: ^1Shaw: ^7I didn't quite catch what you said, Scarlet. There was a lot of screaming going on.
hash_2ce39480e41cd84b: ^1Shaw: ^7I could probably bring down a bloody elephant with this.     But that would be cruel - And pointless.
hash_2ce39780e41cdd64: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hmmm... This is good. A few modifications might even make it better.
hash_2ce39980e41ce0ca: ^1Diego: ^7I do not yet know how the flesh and bones of the damned delivers us weapons of war.
hash_2ce39a80e41ce27d: ^1Bruno: ^7I am proficient in all firearms. Even ones so... unfamiliar.
hash_2d75ccb2a3aaf45b: ^1Shaw: ^7I've got an absolutely horrible headache, and this banging isn't helping.
hash_2dbca49799572391: ^1Bruno: ^7France's national hero was known as 'the Hammer.'     This has fuck all to do with the situation at hand.
hash_2dbca697995726f7: ^1Shaw: ^7So does this thing make me Thor? Because my eye is so Odin...
hash_2dd377bfd14ce799: ^1Shaw: ^7That was a joint effort - My thrust, and your momentum!
hash_2dd378bfd14ce94c: ^1Diego: ^7After this is over. I will need a long, hot shower.
hash_2e37c6bcdd8b2188: ^1Bruno: ^7It screams as though it were alive - And in agony.
hash_2e37c9bcdd8b26a1: ^1Scarlett: ^7So - I guess shit just does whatever it wants on this ship...
hash_2e37ccbcdd8b2bba: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, well. Not the first time someone I liked abandoned me.
hash_2e53dcaa1c287c06: ^1Bruno: ^7How did this happen? Is it the Mexican's fault?
hash_2e53ddaa1c287db9: ^1Diego: ^7I am not discouraged - You see, this setback was *part* of my plan.
hash_2e53deaa1c287f6c: ^1Shaw: ^7What if the others are right? What if I *am* useless?
hash_2e739446454fda67: ^1Narrator: ^7You're going to have to crouch to get under this debris.

hash_2ee972150b394c38: Üˇ3Óßę'Ėfnowing my luck, that's either something good... or we're going to die. So you're welcome! And sorry!
hash_2ee978150b39566a: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh merde. Uh... the alarm is a good thing, oui?
hash_2ee979150b39581d: ^1Diego: ^7Uh... Should I not have done that?     I mean, 'who did that!'
hash_2f0830f10e340d38: ^1Scarlett: ^7Disembodied voices announcing free ammo? What the fuck is really going on here?
hash_2f0832f10e34109e: ^1Diego: ^7When you've seen as much of life as I have, a strange benefactor providing ammo is not so out of the ordinary.
hash_2f0833f10e341251: ^1Bruno: ^7Now is not the time the motivations of le fantome. That will come later.
hash_2f0835f10e3415b7: ^1Shaw: ^7I suppose I should be thanking you!     Erm, thank you?    Whoever the fuck you are.
hash_2f3e4e622d993fb8: ^1Shaw: ^7That's what you get! For doing what you did.
hash_2f3e53622d994837: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll get to every damn one of you Scab-heads before I'm through...
hash_2f3e55622d994b9d: ^1Diego: ^7You insulted me, and I simply could not let that go.
hash_2f481035290debf0: ^1Bruno: ^7I accept this blood money, only because of our dire situation.
hash_2f481135290deda3: ^1Diego: ^7Here we are facing certain death and this - fantasma! - is talking about points!
hash_2f481335290df109: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sure - I'll take the help... But don't for a minute think, I'm gonna give you anything back!
hash_2f481635290df622: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes... double points... for all the.. Uh... all the..    Murdering.
hash_2f9802e4d851af74: ^1Scarlett: ^7Slow down a bit, Shaw! You don't want to overdo it and give yourself a Hernia!
hash_2f9804e4d851b2da: ^1Diego: ^7Nicely done, Shaw! Later on I'll reward you with a little medal.
hash_2f9805e4d851b48d: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey Shaw! I hope you can prescribe yourself something to calm... yourself down!
hash_2fae9c090997f499: ^1Narrator: ^7Use the Hammer of Valhalla to lay waste to these zombies.
hash_2fbf132ba45c5800: ^1Shaw: ^7Prima Materia. The foundation of all creation. The building blocks of life itself.
hash_2fc2fee6447ffb56: ^1Shaw: ^7Someone else want to take this? It's certainly not what I ordered.
hash_2fc300e6447ffebc: ^1Bruno: ^7Would anyone like this? I don't need it.
hash_2fc301e64480006f: ^1Diego: ^7Who wants a weapon from the Generous Diego Necalli?
hash_2fc303e6448003d5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Who wants this? It's not what I'm looking for.
hash_2fc66cac010f819e: ^1Scarlett: ^7It died like it lived: ugly as sin.
hash_2fdf68be9e315a9b: ^1Scarlett: ^7You looking to get hurt? Because that's what's going to happen.
hash_2fdf69be9e315c4e: ^1Bruno: ^7Those who wrong me are usually found at bottom of The Seine. They did not drown.
hash_2fdf6abe9e315e01: ^1Diego: ^7If it is violence you seek, then it is violence you will find.
hash_2fdf6bbe9e315fb4: ^1Shaw: ^7That'll leave a bruise. I hate bruises. They make my tattoos all wonky.
hash_2ff8768cf6d9a1c8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I take it you came straigh from Hell - Am I right little guy?
hash_2ff8788cf6d9a52e: ^1Diego: ^7I think I want you as far away from me as is physically possible.
hash_2ff8798cf6d9a6e1: ^1Bruno: ^7May you unleash your blood-lust upon those who deserve it most.
hash_2ff87b8cf6d9aa47: ^1Shaw: ^7Goodness me - You've got a dirty mouth!
hash_3011a3740993eee8: ^1Bruno: ^7You may lack legs, but you do not lack will.
hash_3011a4740993f09b: ^1Diego: ^7You just don't know when to quit, do you?
hash_3011a6740993f401: ^1Scarlett: ^7Y'know, persistence is usually a virtue, but these floor-jockeys are working my last nerve.
hash_3011a9740993f91a: ^1Shaw: ^7Are your legs... off doing... their 'own' thing?

hash_306d2b7be2e69268: ^1Diego: ^7You cannot silence the great Diego Necalli!!    HELLO...??
hash_306d327be2e69e4d: ^1Shaw: ^7CAN ANYONE HEAR ME??? AM I DEAF??

hash_33a769cfd11ced75: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh I get it, it's a game of chance!     I'll be watching for any sign of statistical inconsistencies...
hash_33bd60a5dfd92e9e: ^1Bruno: ^7There is no shame in making a tactical retreat, Ms Rhodes.
hash_33bd61a5dfd93051: ^1Diego: ^7You are fine woman, Scarlett. I have absolute confidence that you will endure.
hash_33bd62a5dfd93204: ^1Shaw: ^7Concentrate on your breathing Scarlett! You'll die if you forget to do it.
hash_33c0e2d8b9d09c48: ^1Bruno: ^7Are they all dead? Is it over? Can we go home?
hash_33c0e5d8b9d0a161: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm just glad they won't be wailing and screaming for that much longer.
hash_33c0e8d8b9d0a67a: ^1Shaw: ^7Was that me? Did I do that?     How do I do it again?

hash_341f604bb8b9bc13: ^1Shaw: ^7I've not felt this euphoric since I stood up to the school bully!     I told the teacher.
hash_341f634bb8b9c12c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Lifeboats aren't going to save anyone - least of all you.
hash_341f654bb8b9c492: ^1Diego: ^7I should have introduced myself - I am Diego Necalli - YOUR EXECUTIONER!
hash_341f664bb8b9c645: ^1Bruno: ^7Causing damage is my greatest strength... But also my deepest regret.
hash_3427b86de4fb527b: Hold [{+activate}] to convert to Radiance Ammo
hash_342e591c73355599: ^1Diego: ^7Back for more, chupacabra? Well, Diego has saved this dance for you.
hash_342e5a1c7335574c: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, shite. Does somebody else want to deal with that thing?!?
hash_34334afae625a318: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, just shut your gob. I can't hear myself think anymore.
hash_345b1ba2d62e3a83: ^1Shaw: ^7Finally. An end to this big charade we call life.
hash_345b1ea2d62e3f9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm a bit surprised they aren't piling on to devour me.
hash_345b20a2d62e4302: ^1Diego: ^7Given my usual proficiency, anyone who sees me like this may think I am having a small rest.
hash_345b21a2d62e44b5: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe I should just let go... Maybe I shouldn't be here.
hash_345f7821a42c5e93: ^1Shaw: ^7At what point do these things become overkill?
hash_345f7b21a42c63ac: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know where this weird-ass box is getting these guns... but I'm not complaining.
hash_345f7d21a42c6712: ^1Diego: ^7Even in the hands of a novice, this is a formidable weapon.
hash_345f7e21a42c68c5: ^1Bruno: ^7I should be happy  magique box provides such weapons... yet I am uneasy.
hash_348f1a3dc7f40b48: ^1Shaw: ^7You do know that you've probably ruined your nice trousers.
hash_348f1f3dc7f413c7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hope you're not to proud to accept my help...
hash_348f203dc7f4157a: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe you should leave the fighting to the *real* soldiers...
hash_34915ecd6be67c3e: ^1Shaw: ^7We're being manipulated by powerful forces - in fact, I think we may be being 'corralled'.
hash_349160cd6be67fa4: ^1Bruno: ^7The doors are sealed - unless we  provide necessary payment.
hash_349161cd6be68157: ^1Diego: ^7Hold on a moment - Did I just give a door money?!
hash_349163cd6be684bd: ^1Scarlett: ^7'Something' is controlling all this - limiting our ability to navigate the ship.
hash_3493623d37d8abd9: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I saw some of it. Once. Long ago in Cambodia.     I was hitting the 'you know what' quite hard, so I kind of thought I was just *hallucinating*.
hash_34954ecf99b29afe: ^1Shaw: ^7I've not seen ANYTHING that angry since Evelyn discovered my secret compartment.
hash_349550cf99b29e64: ^1Bruno: ^7I think that creature is both the biggest - and smallest - Monstre of all.
hash_349551cf99b2a017: ^1Diego: ^7That's a lot of anger. Especially for something so small.
hash_349553cf99b2a37d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've seen a lot of ugly things today, but that's probably the ugliest.

hash_34ca6fd76d853986: ^1Diego: ^7I prefer not to use scopes. Adds to the challenge.
hash_34ca70d76d853b39: ^1Bruno: ^7Sniper rifles and I have a storied history.
hash_34ca72d76d853e9f: ^1Shaw: ^7Wait a minute... Are there any areas actually wide enough on this ship to make using a sniper rifle an effective strategy?
hash_34dd0a72aa04ac98: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what we don't need - More bad news.
hash_34dd0c72aa04affe: ^1Diego: ^7All I know for sure, is that it was definitely not my fault.

hash_3506c6fbbb4c4db8: L1Shaw: ^7Can you try banging a little quieter? It's making my eyeballs tremble.
hash_3506ccfbbb4c57ea: ^1Bruno: ^7I hear the sound of work, but see no hands to guide it.
hash_3506cdfbbb4c599d: ^1Diego: ^7Yet more mysterious help from los espiritus.
hash_353c507e8d02a5f0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ooof - That's a bad smell - I should probably stand further back.
hash_353c527e8d02a956: ^1Diego: ^7With a big enough explosion, I could possibly clear the ship.
hash_353c537e8d02ab09: ^1Bruno: ^7I enjoy the silence that follows an explosion...
hash_353c557e8d02ae6f: ^1Shaw: ^7C-7-H-5-N-3-O-6?! With perhaps a touch of N-I-3? That's Wonderful!
hash_353f3ec1f4fa0109: Hold [{+activate}] to convert to Decay Ammo [Cost: &&1]
hash_354a907b45c3e03b: ^1Shaw: ^7These weapons look priceless. Heavens knows why I'm trusted with them.
hash_354a967b45c3ea6d: ^1Bruno: ^7If it's vengeance you want, then take it.
hash_35527cefa67ae909: ^1Shaw: ^7Didn't see that coming, did you? I did - I watched the whole thing.
hash_35527defa67aeabc: ^1Diego: ^7Diego Necalli doesn't hold grudges -  He just acts upon them.
hash_35527eefa67aec6f: ^1Bruno: ^7Your insult has cost you whatever there was of your life.
hash_35527fefa67aee22: ^1Scarlett: ^7You remember signing your death warrant? It was the second you laid your hands on me.
hash_35604b2e87407a86: ^1Shaw: ^7...just got to be careful not to hit my thumb... OWWWW! FUCK!
hash_35604e2e87407f9f: ^1Diego: ^7I'm sure Bruno could make a better job of this - He must have performed many menial tasks while serving in the legion...
hash_3560502e87408305: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is better than nothing. No much, but slightly.
hash_3576a4d9b2baf4b8: Hold [{+activate}] to convert to Radiance Ammo [Cost: &&1]
hash_359aa727f43f2b60: ^1Shaw: ^7Bruno likes these! He told me 'they get the jobs done.'
hash_359aac27f43f33df: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not sure if this is gonna cut it. Not with them all being as hungry as they are.
hash_359aad27f43f3592: ^1Bruno: ^7Shotguns were common in underworld, less so on the battlefield.
hash_359aae27f43f3745: ^1Diego: ^7Shotguns really can make a mess.     Which is unfortunate for those - me - who take pride in our appearance.
hash_35dddd005f0c04c0: ^1Diego: ^7You dare strike out at the Great Diego Necalli??
hash_35ddde005f0c0673: ^1Bruno: ^7I understand what you are doing. Pain can be a useful motivator.
hash_35dddf005f0c0826: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not great with first impressions, are you, dead-head?
hash_35dde4005f0c10a5: ^1Shaw: ^7I've not felt the touch of another since she left me. Not much before either.
hash_35f7ecb578bddb3b: ^1Shaw: ^7You know, I'm already pretty nimble for a man of my age.     Just ask the squirrels.
hash_35f7f1b578bde3ba: ^1Diego: ^7Smells a lot like my old friend Pancho's "wake-up" juice.
hash_35f7f2b578bde56d: ^1Bruno: ^7A vapor to enhance my focus?     I cannot condone the use of illicit substances. It is cheating.
hash_3602f08542533f02: ^1Shaw: ^7Doctor Shaw is here to help!    Well, not that I'm that type of Doctor. Nor the other type, really.
hash_36082b941d6818c4: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4FŪĖ™zķ/.p]B`őłÖy ďā©ď”#8ŔĚėH#íć*ū¶ķGŖo\vssession, I see no reason to not head for the lifeboats.
hash_3624fc743fa2fe4b: ^1Shaw: ^7I know this shape. These symbols. Think, Shaw, think!     Oooh, that's a gorgeous shade of blue...
hash_3624ff743fa30364: ^1Scarlett: ^7I get the gun part. It's the transaction that leaves me confused.
hash_362501743fa306ca: ^1Diego: ^7Say 'thank you' to the nice wall, Diego.    Gracias, pared. *weary sigh*
hash_362502743fa3087d: ^1Bruno: ^7The symbols, what do they mean? Perhaps Shaw may finally prove useful.
hash_3639a735e6c20233: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair, you devious son of a bitch! If this is all your way of collecting that bail money I still owe you...!
hash_3639aa35e6c2074c: ^1Scarlett: ^7So...we have to kill ghouls to earn points to buy stuff to kill more ghouls.      I call bullshit.
hash_3639ac35e6c20ab2: ^1Diego: ^7Is this part of your 'Trial'? A pathetic attempt to extort money? You will be the one who pays, in the end.
hash_3639ad35e6c20c65: ^1Bruno: ^7You want payment? Merde! This voyage really was for the rich.
hash_3641589693b0644b: ^1Diego: ^7That was purely a tactical choice - Designed to lull the enemy into a false sense of security.
hash_36415d9693b06cca: ^1Shaw: ^7OOOOH! I feel very rejuvenated after that!
hash_36516531a06d8e5b: ^1Scarlett: ^7This should tear a few new ones in the old ones.
hash_36516631a06d900e: ^1Bruno: ^7Sturdy, reliable weapon.  Provided you do not need to move.
hash_36516731a06d91c1: ^1Diego: ^7I am not saying this gun is not useful... but must it be so heavy?
hash_36516831a06d9374: ^1Shaw: ^7Ha! Let's see them try to nibble my niblets now!
hash_365a3a1f04fb6cad: ^1Shaw: ^7I seem like someone who is carefully analyzing the emergent reality around them in order to better understand how he - or she - May improve their situation?
hash_365e85296176ebc6: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, just shut your gob, for fuck's sake. I can't hear myself think anymore.
hash_365e87296176ef2c: ^1Bruno: ^7Off you go. Don't forget to write.
hash_365e88296176f0df: ^1Diego: ^7You could have crawled the other way, senor cuco. Instead, you crawled to death.
hash_365e8a296176f445: ^1Scarlett: ^7It didn't have to be this way, bub.     Okay, maybe it did.
hash_3671f96e9b8925f6: ^1Shaw: ^7Freeeeesh munitions! Come and get your fresh munitions.
hash_3671fb6e9b89295c: ^1Bruno: ^7When fighting such an enemy, any assistance is welcomed.
hash_3671fc6e9b892b0f: ^1Diego: ^7Do not think me ungrateful... But I am unsure who exactly I should thank.
hash_3671fe6e9b892e75: ^1Scarlett: ^7Least it saves me from shelling out my own hard earned dough.
hash_36721029d78fb7b7: ^1Scarlett: ^7The Viper is mean as a snake!
hash_36938f1e577f8756: ^1Shaw: ^7What exactly am I smelling? Is that you or me?
hash_3693911e577f8abc: ^1Bruno: ^7Evil haunts this ship.    But that stench will haunt us all.
hash_36cc72fbc293d7c5: ^1Shaw: ^7Wait what? Did everyone else see what just happened?     Wait. It may just be my so called senses deceiving me.     I'll be okay in a minute.
hash_36d08f66cbd4c6c1: ^1Shaw: ^7I never actually qualified as a doctor - but I know exactly what I'm doing!
hash_36d09066cbd4c874: ^1Diego: ^7Do not fret, Frenchman. I can - and will - save you.
hash_36d09266cbd4cbda: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm sure you're not too proud to take the help, Bruno.
hash_371b94c24e648ce2: ^1Narrator: ^7Just remember, a shield can eventually break, but you can buy a replacement at the workbench.
hash_373bffccd4646778: ^1Scarlett: ^7This whole day's gotten crazy.   I'm just rising to the occasion.
hash_374c70443901e4f1: ^1Shaw: ^7Fat lot of good that shovel did you.
hash_374c71443901e6a4: ^1Diego: ^7Whoever you were, I shall console your family. Especially your sister.
hash_374c72443901e857: ^1Bruno: ^7This man was forced to fight for a cause not his own. I know the feeling.
hash_374c73443901ea0a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You swing a mean shovel, but, you know...it's a fucking shovel.
hash_379b4bb53ea0659b: ^1Scarlett: ^7This had better be worth the taste, Shaw.
hash_379b4cb53ea0674e: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not feel effect... Wait... Wait... Okay. Now I feel effect.
hash_37a28ebb5650f832: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is just the icing on the cake! Well done Dad! If messing up my life at least three times already wasn't enough, you just went and did it again!
hash_37c061326fe9230e: ^1Bruno: ^7Like almost everything else on this ship, this 'eye' wishes us dead.
hash_37d622095e24682e: ^1Shaw: ^7This invention better work, Scarlett. I could really do with the help.
hash_37d624095e246b94: ^1Bruno: ^7Hmm. Parts of Mademoiselle Rhodes' contraption. Why did she leave this here?
hash_37d625095e246d47: ^1Diego: ^7Did Scarlett say she crafted this? I honestly can't remember.
hash_37d627095e2470ad: ^1Scarlett: ^7This section of my shield doesn't look too bad - apart from the blood and sputum...
hash_380f0d882a269dee: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, yes, I certainly took *the egg* on that one.     That means I WON.
hash_380f0f882a26a154: ^1Bruno: ^7You were beyond redemption - foul, cursed creature.
hash_380f10882a26a307: ^1Diego: ^7I believe that may well be the shortest haircut you have ever been given.
hash_380f12882a26a66d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ya see? My steady hands come in useful outside the workshop.
hash_38369cf48fdbcb56: ^1Shaw: ^7This looks like some mutation -  transformation - that went a bit wrong...     Oh dear, I pity the poor souls caught in the middle of it.
hash_38369ef48fdbcebc: ^1Bruno: ^7When I dined with Diego last night - This dining room was beautiful.    Now it looks more like my bathroom.     I had Salmon.
hash_38369ff48fdbd06f: ^1Diego: ^7Some poor souls were less fortunate than others. Some of them... may have had the Salmon for dinner.
hash_3836a1f48fdbd3d5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Look at all this.... Gunk. What is that?? Did it all just leak out from the artifact??
hash_383b56ca53a36b0c: ^1Scarlett: ^7No one shafts me on a deal - Especially not some old rickety box of bones!
hash_383b58ca53a36e72: ^1Diego: ^7Though it is something of a monstrosity, its denial of my wishes feels much like a slap in the face.
hash_383b59ca53a37025: ^1Bruno: ^7I am trying not to believe that there is a curse upon this vessel.
hash_3851918868ab4e61: ^1Shaw: ^7Am I truly lost? Should I just give up now, embrace defeat, shutter the shades, and curl up in a ball?
hash_3851938868ab51c7: ^1Bruno: ^7Last time I was this angry, people got hurt.
hash_385e63f249932ea2: ^1Narrator: ^7Oh dear. Let's chalk it up to beginner's luck. BAD luck.
hash_38f1faf0fefd447b: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh dear...     I breathed out when I meant to breathe in.
hash_38f1fff0fefd4cfa: ^1Diego: ^7*That*... is an odd sensation. I can feel my brain vibrating.
hash_38f200f0fefd4ead: ^1Bruno: ^7Woah... I find myself wondering - How much is too much?
hash_38fe0c41fb8d5880: ^1Diego: ^7This weapon will send a message to those walking carcasses.
hash_38fe0d41fb8d5a33: ^1Bruno: ^7A weapon engineered to remind man of life's fragility.
hash_38fe0e41fb8d5be6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I wonder if Bruno's familiar with these firearms?
hash_391e665f202a74cb: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'd call you cute, but you clearly aren't.
hash_391e675f202a767e: ^1Bruno: ^7Despite all I have seen, this creature may be the hardest to look upon.
hash_391e685f202a7831: ^1Diego: ^7I saw a drawing that looked very much like you. I thought it was a bad drawing, but now I see you...
hash_391e695f202a79e4: ^1Shaw: ^7I bet you could tell some stories! By the way - I'm not interested in hearing them.

hash_39ff79bc0e74f9d5: ^1Narrator: ^7Welcome to Zombies! Let's teach you the basics.
hash_3a61c9378ee2d03b: ^1Shaw: ^7A short, sharp shock, and all is done.     Sod it, let's make it a long one!
hash_3a61ce378ee2d8ba: ^1Diego: ^7Hammer, you're coming back to Mexico with me.

hash_3a749042fb751ec6: ^1Shaw: ^7This is JUST what I was looking for - That time I was lost.
hash_3a749242fb75222c: ^1Bruno: ^7Bonjour, little piece - yet to find its whole.
hash_3a749342fb7523df: ^1Diego: ^7My heart says 'this is important.' My brain says 'stop picking up random objects, you kleptomaniac.'
hash_3a812772e47fb401: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to the Grand Staircase
hash_3a81aa36cd6dd5cd: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Poop Deck [Cost: &&1]
hash_3b1af589342df709: ^1Shaw: ^7Amazing. I just thought of it and it happened! Let me try again!     No. Didn't work.
hash_3b1af689342df8bc: ^1Diego: ^7Is this your way of helping, fantasma?
hash_3b1af789342dfa6f: ^1Bruno: ^7Litle more than a symbolic gesture - Given that the craftsmanship is so poor.
hash_3b1af889342dfc22: ^1Scarlett: ^7We'll take all the help we can get - Even if it is a half-ass job.
hash_3b50b02fc5b99220: ^1Diego: ^7Success. I will always achieve it - By any means necessary.
hash_3b50b12fc5b993d3: ^1Bruno: ^7Any victory - however small - is still a victory.
hash_3b50b72fc5b99e05: ^1Shaw: ^7I've good news! We just did the thing we were trying to do
hash_3b71aad765e4c0b1: ^1Shaw: ^7Chemists really shouldn't get their hands dirty - especially not with splatters of blood.
hash_3b71abd765e4c264: ^1Diego: ^7A shotgun. I am not insulted, just... insulted.
hash_3b71acd765e4c417: ^1Bruno: ^7I know this weapon well. Very damaging to kneecaps.     And groin.
hash_3b71add765e4c5ca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Alistair only ever shot Clay Pigeons. Wish I could say the same.
hash_3bc831b0241c6b7b: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I get cornered, I've always got the Hammer.
hash_3bc832b0241c6d2e: ^1Bruno: ^7Let the monsters come. I shall unleash the Hammer.
hash_3bc833b0241c6ee1: ^1Diego: ^7They say a hammer can build many things. A table...a house...a mountain of corpses...
hash_3bc834b0241c7094: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, hammer, I feel you. I'll be calling down the lightning soon enough.
hash_3bdbb36c1d046393: ^1Shaw: ^7I've felt a pervading sense of dread all day. Now I know why.
hash_3bdbb66c1d0468ac: ^1Scarlett: ^7Brain-deads' skin is pretty leathery - I doubt this will even leave a mark.
hash_3bdbb86c1d046c12: ^1Diego: ^7Do you realize how sad you make me? Look at my face, it should be obvious.
hash_3bdbb96c1d046dc5: ^1Bruno: ^7Oui, les monstres will fear Bruno and his miniature shooter of pebbles.
hash_3c172297e64ca140: ^1Shaw: ^7The Beacon of Light! A noble guard! Protector of our backsides!
hash_3c172797e64ca9bf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Mind the bubble, freaks. It's my personal space.
hash_3c2866bcd84910b8: ^1Diego: ^7I saw pictures of such weapons in a magazine. I did not look too closely - I was the cover story.
hash_3c2867bcd849126b: ^1Bruno: ^7Just before I left the Legion, my brothers were starting to receive such arms.
hash_3c2868bcd849141e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Guns like this are going to change things. Forever.
hash_3c286dbcd8491c9d: ^1Shaw: ^7First time I held a gun like this I kind of... fired in all directions.     And nobody was hurt. Not a single person. Everyone lived. Not one injury.
hash_3c2df5f161209670: ^1Bruno: ^7What just...happened? Head feels full of...broken glass...
hash_3c2df6f161209823: ^1Diego: ^7Arh! Keep firing! The blindness will pass!
hash_3c2dfbf16120a0a2: ^1Shaw: ^7Agh...like pissing on...the third rail.     Trust Me, I've done it...
hash_3c476d31c423ce00: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, Deigo - You went through them like grass through a goose!
hash_3c4bc911f00d4c83: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened? Am I still in one piece?
hash_3c5416639de3d578: ^1Shaw: ^7Fascinating: the creature seems composed of fire and coal.    Well, terrifying, really, but fascinating, too.
hash_3c541b639de3ddf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Couldn't just stay in the boiler room, could you?
hash_3c541c639de3dfaa: ^1Bruno: ^7Bonjour, shovel man! We have to stop meeting like this, non?
hash_3c541d639de3e15d: ^1Diego: ^7Never bring a shovel to a gun fight.

hash_3e2594fcf2bee0e7: ^1Narrator: ^7Teamwork is everything.  Sometimes you have to rely on your companions to progress.
hash_3e2938dbe5259d4b: ^1Shaw: ^7I shouldn't re-use these blades. Gotta be worse than dirty needles.

hash_3e293ddbe525a5ca: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, Viper, you do not fail to impress!
hash_3e293edbe525a77d: ^1Bruno: ^7The Viper, she has more teeth than a shark.
hash_3e576f86969cf81e: ^1Diego: ^7I find myself wondering if Lady McKendrick met with the same fate as these other poor souls.     It would be such a shame - she was so beautiful.

hash_3e7a029ba1945a71: ^1Shaw: ^7I suppose I should be thanking you!     Erm, thank you?     Whoever you are.

hash_3eb512aaaeedc116: ^1Diego: ^7By blade is so swift, you probably did not even feel it pierce your fetid flesh.
hash_3eb515aaaeedc62f: ^1Shaw: ^7That's far closer than I'm comfortable with.

hash_3ed24d8ddd4bc989: ^1Diego: ^7It seems someone - or something - seeks to reward our efforts.

hash_4041bc371d5f1334: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, the spinning revenger blades of doom have recharged.
hash_406667f9dc743e28: ^1Bruno: ^7As always, I am surrounded by death.
hash_406668f9dc743fdb: ^1Diego: ^7It's raining blades and blood -- watch out!
hash_40666df9dc74485a: ^1Shaw: ^7Establishing a PERIMETER!' That's a thing people say, yes?
hash_40706956aa62b018: ^1Scarlett: ^7Someone want this? I'm not taking it.
hash_40706b56aa62b37e: ^1Diego: ^7Perhaps for someone whose standards aren't so refined would like this.
hash_40706e56aa62b897: ^1Shaw: ^7Perhaps one of the others will acquire you, weapon. But not I.
hash_4080c4e5c3826b10: ^1Shaw: ^7I hope this doesn't leave my arms all sore. My arms are very important. I use them for -     All sorts of things.
hash_4080c9e5c382738f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm thinking it may prove to be a pain in the ass to reload.
hash_4080cae5c3827542: ^1Bruno: ^7Where is the bipod? This gun should come with bipod... am I expected to just carry it everywhere?
hash_4080cbe5c38276f5: ^1Diego: ^7On my travels I saw the Danish use weapons like these. Ahead of their time, perhaps - But that's the Danish for you.
hash_40adc0c6f9f2f502: ^1Shaw: ^7Never mind turning lead into gold.  I'm turning gold into lead.
hash_40c044c9c8ae03e8: ^1Bruno: ^7You do not want me to see angry, monstres. I can be quite sadistic.
hash_40c045c9c8ae059b: ^1Diego: ^7You tear my coat - I tear your flesh!
hash_40c047c9c8ae0901: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't try that shit with me! I will cut you bad.
hash_40c04ac9c8ae0e1a: ^1Shaw: ^7Eeh... I've got gunk all over me. I can't even begin to identify what it is.
hash_40c0fc9f9cd135e9: ^1Shaw: ^7Sometimes, Diego, even I am amazed I'm still alive.
hash_40c0fe9f9cd1394f: ^1Bruno: ^7Please, no jokes about playing doctor, or your bedside manner, or whatever, oui?
hash_40c0ff9f9cd13b02: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah, yeah, enjoy this moment, Diego. Just make sure it never ends up in one of your dime novels.
hash_40df7c74afadf3d7: ^1Shaw: ^7Slice and dice, my blades. Slice and dice.
hash_4108e4b545c74c7b: ^1Bruno: ^7The vomit is   disgusting...    But that smell...
hash_411fe8d38c3c36b0: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh! Happy day! I should celebrate. Later. When I'm not at risk of imminent death.
hash_411fedd38c3c3f2f: ^1Scarlett: ^7This had better be the start of a lucky streak, or I'm gonna start lashing out...
hash_411feed38c3c40e2: ^1Bruno: ^7We should build on this success. We are not yet out of the woods.
hash_411fefd38c3c4295: ^1Diego: ^7Bien. Which - by the way my friends - is Spanish for 'good'.
hash_415baac2df67c0bb: ^1Shaw: ^7Looks like they had a rough go of it back here. Packed in like sardines.
hash_415badc2df67c5d4: ^1Scarlett: ^7...This just keeps getting better and better...
hash_415bafc2df67c93a: ^1Diego: ^7Even without this *curse*, the passengers trapped down here never stood a chance.
hash_415bb0c2df67caed: ^1Bruno: ^7What new hell do we descend into now?
hash_4173f5fbb5476c5d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Given what happened when the artifacts were locked together...      I think my father wanted the two parts as far away from each other as possible.
