hash_45336259934ca2c4: ^1Scarlett: ^7This was a tactical move, right Deigo? Surely you weren't bested in combat?
hash_45336559934ca7dd: ^1Bruno: ^7Were you over confident Diego? It certainly looks like you were over confident.
hash_45562e21b7d90cd8: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh my... It feels like my lungs have just doubled in size!
hash_45563321b7d91557: ^1Scarlett: ^7That... sure makes your eyes focus. And water.
hash_45563421b7d9170a: ^1Bruno: ^7A soldier must remain focussed at all times. I am soldier. I am focussed.
hash_45563521b7d918bd: ^1Diego: ^7This brings good health?    Surely my toned physique is some indication of just how healthy I already am?
hash_4566c9fa94ad01ba: ź58-d-N~=r!ňíB00^D: sK—VŗÚĽ"#!~Ī>šIc[öĮŁ, żļq’ĎŁ¨	ömpŇÕ∑≠J¶-ĎįtżoA£{$H“7ŚÖ`ýņĮeÜˇ3Óßę'Ėb'd keel over too if I looked like you.
hash_45709be4bfeacf11: Üˇ3Óßę'Ėb'd keel over too if I looked like you.
hash_45709ce4bfead0c4: ^1Diego: ^7You may be bigger, uglier, and tongue-ier than your brothers...but you die just like the rest.
hash_45709ee4bfead42a: ^1Scarlett: ^7So, what's a girl got to do never see one of those monsters again?
hash_45a760914d7a7d69: ^1Scarlett: ^7My father - Alistair Rhodes - didn't give me up.      He tore our family apart.
hash_45cb92ef47ee3ccb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Want something done right, do it yourself.
hash_45cb93ef47ee3e7e: ^1Bruno: ^7This is how it goes - I am a servant to fate itself.
hash_45cb94ef47ee4031: ^1Diego: ^7I did not need - nor want - anyone's help anyway.
hash_45cb95ef47ee41e4: ^1Shaw: ^7Barely a scratch... Oh shit, I hope it doesn't get infected. It looks a bit infected.
hash_461205a6d16d588d: ^1Diego: ^7Fear not, Shaw - It is your honor for me to save you.
hash_462028dcaa428f7b: ^1Shaw: ^7What a naughty little shit you are.
hash_46202bdcaa429494: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shoot that sneaky blue freak before he supercharges the rest of 'em!
hash_46202ddcaa4297fa: ^1Diego: ^7Kill the blue ones on sight, amigos. They make our job ten times harder.
hash_46202edcaa4299ad: ^1Bruno: ^7The monstres bleus must die. Or we surely will.
hash_462d5a707ebb8343: ^1Shaw: ^7Ooh. Feels nice in here. Y'know, if you're not already dead.
hash_462d5f707ebb8bc2: ^1Diego: ^7I claim this land in the name of the Queen!     Not you, Scarlett.
hash_462d60707ebb8d75: ^1Bruno: ^7A moment to breathe. Use it wisely.
hash_46402d78de39b840: ^1Diego: ^7The Chakram's first responsibility is death. Its second is to make it  look as beautiful as possible.
hash_46403478de39c425: ^1Shaw: ^7Feels like the Chakrams are readier than ever.
hash_466244b376b83018: ^1Shaw: ^7Time. Is. Relative.     My relative won't even talk to me anymore.
hash_46624ab376b83a4a: ^1Bruno: ^7This makes me dizzy. It is not good dizzy.
hash_46662865e77a439e: ^1Diego: ^7Congratulations, Scarlett you are now the second member of the Rhodes Family whose life I have saved.
hash_46662965e77a4551: ^1Bruno: ^7As you know, I owe your father my life. The least I can do is save yours.
hash_46662b65e77a48b7: ^1Shaw: ^7Are you angry, Scarlett? I would be if I were down there just sat on my bum.
hash_466fa8f6da8ac6cb: ^1Scarlett: ^7From now on - Every one of you that jumps overboard is getting off easy.
hash_46a4cc746fe31821: ^1Shaw: ^7It's better to get it over quick, isn't it Diego?
hash_46a4ce746fe31b87: ^1Bruno: ^7If you stopped talking, you could probably do that again.
hash_46a4cf746fe31d3a: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see what you're doing, Diego. Keep doing it.
hash_46ac72784c5bf3f8: Hold [{+activate}] to convert to Decay Ammo
hash_46d9122da1e5c931: Press [{+activate}] to convert to Radiance Ammo
hash_46e95edb863bb5c9: ^1Narrator: ^7The undead come in many varieties, each with their own unique behaviors.   This one's a catalyst zombie.
hash_47022d98537dd9ee: ^1Bruno: ^7I bet she is not beautiful now. I bet she looks like tenderized beef...    That went rotten...    And was chewed by a stray dog.
hash_471ca59153482530: ^1Diego: ^7Okay, I suppose I should do my share to 'carry the load'.
hash_471ca691534826e3: ^1Bruno: ^7All things in life find their  purpose. This one will be no different.
hash_471cac9153483115: ^1Shaw: ^7What is this? Is it rare? Is it valuable? Can I sell it?
hash_4722d31b7e5b0240: ^1Shaw: ^7I hadn't heard that much screaming and moaning and slobbering since I rented that flat above a brothel.
hash_4722d81b7e5b0abf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Out of your misery. That makes one of us.
hash_4722d91b7e5b0c72: ^1Bruno: ^7No more will you claw and scratch at Bruno's precious 'Delacroixs.'
hash_4740fb8ebd623f7e: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, man--! My eyes are watering so bad I cannot see...!
hash_4740fe8ebd624497: ^1Shaw: ^7Woo-eee. That's left me a bit light headed. Well, more than usual.
hash_47605a6212623d48: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett should have made it more clear that *some assembly* would be required.
hash_47605f62126245c7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Have I got all three pieces yet? I can't remember...?
hash_476060621262477a: ^1Bruno: ^7If Mademoiselle Rhodes' passion is anything like Alistair's, this is a fine invention.
hash_476061621262492d: ^1Diego: ^7The Senorita should take better care of her equipment. Anyone could grab this from here.
hash_478cc1c031e2d665: ^1Shaw: ^7If you want to do the rest for me, I won't stop you.
hash_478d46f192bd87eb: ^1Bruno: ^7I am impressed, Scarlett. Few women possess such skill.
hash_478d4cf192bd921d: ^1Shaw: ^7I think your Dad would almost - probably - be proud!
hash_479945e0de647308: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Evelyn! I do know how to deal with the neighbors!
hash_47994be0de647d3a: ^1Bruno: ^7I gain nothing by allowing you to get closer to me - Monstre!
hash_47994ce0de647eed: ^1Diego: ^7I give you - One last kiss.    And they say romance is dead.
hash_47aecf9438c67cb0: ^1Shaw: ^7Look - You got blood on me!     You'd better not be carrying the pox.
hash_47aed69438c68895: ^1Diego: ^7I don't know if you wished to be buried at sea... But that is how it is.

hash_4881bfeecd1d0bd9: ^1Shaw: ^7That sounded a lot 'wetter' than an explosion really should.
hash_4881c0eecd1d0d8c: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, come on! I got some of it in my mouth. Serves me right for cheering.
hash_48a2dd2fe2cd4229: ^1Scarlett: ^7Give a minute - got to let my head clear.      What the hell was in that??
hash_48aea3d7165986ea: ź58-ŕńķšń(Ó"«Ý*—Ę6)Ŗxäļ—\a¨Kď'£ńˇ$#;ˇŗ|ľÄb[ģ[+^Ť≠ōiīĆ≤`Nň/lebÕĹĢÕZśMĎ≥ĒōsAŠ' ūĄõsv∑ýgįPČÉŲ≤«ŌŮ ∆: been legless myself on more than one occasion - but never literally.
hash_48ce1705a1ad94d3: gįPČÉŲ≤«ŌŮ ∆: been legless myself on more than one occasion - but never literally.
hash_48ce1a05a1ad99ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've seen this sort of groveling before. Wasn't attractive then, and it sure as shit ain't now.
hash_48ce1c05a1ad9d52: ^1Diego: ^7Still hungry down there? Ask nicely, and Diego will serve you a Boot-Heel Surprise.
hash_48ce1d05a1ad9f05: ^1Bruno: ^7Reminds me of the Foreign Legion hospital in Tangier - The 'stump factory,' we called it.
hash_48e6f0ff72fad5b3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn right I just punched your freaking ticket!
hash_48e70ddc3d1ffa96: ^1Shaw: ^7The thing was dead before, but its definitely more dead now. Deadier.
hash_48e70fdc3d1ffdfc: ^1Bruno: ^7I'm saying nothing, Diego - Your ego is inflated enough.
hash_48e712dc3d200315: ^1Scarlett: ^7That one looked surprised! I was  too.
hash_491f1ee967f86918: ^1Bruno: ^7For the dead, the Ray of Life brings only peace.
hash_491f1fe967f86acb: ^1Diego: ^7This weapon cleanses evil, cucos, so I have some bad news...
hash_491f24e967f8734a: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't you see? We are healing you! Healing you to death, sure, but still...
hash_493e3559bc6ed5d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair told me about you Bruno, but I'm a little surprised he never once used the term 'Brute'.
hash_493e3859bc6edaec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keep it up, Bruno! These sons of bitches deserve every vicious thing you could possibly deal out.
hash_493e3a59bc6ede52: ^1Diego: ^7Does your merciless brutality come naturally Bruno, or was it something you learned?
hash_49667e9ae20c6000: ^1Scarlett: ^7If that's what's in your stomach, I don't wanna know what's in the rest of ya.
hash_4966809ae20c6366: ^1Diego: ^7You should really chew your food more...
hash_4966819ae20c6519: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh... that is disgusting. Have you no class?
hash_4966839ae20c687f: ^1Shaw: ^7That right there is why moderation is important.
hash_497e2dc04c7073fb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, Hammer, let's nail some freaks.
hash_497e2ec04c7075ae: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in Valhalla...but I can be convinced.
hash_497e30c04c707914: ^1Shaw: ^7They couldn't make this bastard just little lighter...?
hash_498f16f1ee96fb41: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, yes -- I think I've got it now. You require...sacrifices.    Okay! Be right back!
hash_498f17f1ee96fcf4: ^1Diego: ^7You need payment? I have no money.     But perhaps we could work something out...
hash_498f18f1ee96fea7: ^1Bruno: ^7You want money? Porquoi? What need do you have for money?
hash_498f19f1ee97005a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Son of a bitch! If I die because I didn't have enough nickels for Satan's vending machine...
hash_49a7ac81527b546b: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not understand this... La Magie.     Though perhaps trying to understand is a mistake.
hash_49a7ad81527b561e: ^1Scarlett: ^7ABOUT TIME! Here's our chance to nab some decent firepower!
hash_49a7b281527b5e9d: ^1Shaw: ^7Weapons are on sale! Dirt cheap too!    Can anyone spare me a few shillings?
hash_49ae7cd381b54a35: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right I just punched your freaking ticket!
hash_49b9aefc827350b6: ^1Shaw: ^7I know you'd do the same for me, Bruno. In fact, I think you have already.
hash_49b9b1fc827355cf: ^1Diego: ^7You will walk once more, Frenchman -  knowing I have saved you.
hash_49b9b3fc82735935: ^1Scarlett: ^7I take it you ran in to a BIG one, right Bruno?
hash_49c05a35dbf5adc3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Diego looks to be in trouble. I Bet he's just thrilled.
hash_49c05b35dbf5af76: ^1Bruno: ^7Diego does not need to fight harder. He needs to fight smarter.     Right now he looks stupid.
hash_49c05d35dbf5b2dc: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm just going to watch how Diego deals with this. Maybe I'll pick up a few tips.
hash_49dbe69595573443: ^1Diego: ^7The Scepter of Ra has reached a new power level.
hash_49dbe895955737a9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Whoa. The Scepter's buzzing like it learned a new trick.
hash_49dbeb9595573cc2: ^1Shaw: ^7Whoa. I could swear the Scepter's built up an even more power charge.
hash_49f68d080b1f72a0: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, this is cathartic, if nothing else!
hash_49f692080b1f7b1f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Odin's pinch hitter has got a mean swing!
hash_49f694080b1f7e85: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, I could get used to this!
hash_4a72d90596b08743: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like I was just turned inside out.
hash_4a72da0596b088f6: ^1Bruno: ^7I have only felt that sensation once before... a moment from death.
hash_4a72db0596b08aa9: ^1Diego: ^7...there are bad hangovers, then there's whatever that was.
hash_4ab3571c0c7854bc: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Boiler Room
hash_4acb8f517fd20401: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are you all so drawn to me? Do you think I have something for you?!
hash_4acb90517fd205b4: ^1Diego: ^7Ha ha. It is amusing that you think your numbers pose any kind of threat to me.
hash_4acb91517fd20767: ^1Bruno: ^7Your numbers only give me more opportunity to work out my aggression.
hash_4acb92517fd2091a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're lucky I don't throw your rotten asses overboard.
hash_4aed57daaf1f29fc: ^1Diego: ^7My shield is gone! Just when we were starting to get to know each other.
hash_4aed58daaf1f2baf: ^1Bruno: ^7Many things are broken. My shield was just the latest in a long line...
hash_4aed59daaf1f2d62: ^1Scarlett: ^7That shield probably saved my ass more times than I realize.
hash_4af81d41adb12cf9: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey Mexicain! Be careful you do not slip upon the blood of your enemies!
hash_4af81f41adb1305f: ^1Shaw: ^7Why can't I be all brave and macho like that? I should have a serious word with myself.
hash_4b17cde4875e00e4: ^1Narrator: ^7Oh dear. Bruno's in a bit of trouble. Grab that 'Nuke' power-up. It'll buy you some time to get him up on his feet.
hash_4b38e33518593dbf: ^1Scarlett: ^7This wouldn't be here if it wasn't meant for me... is how I justify taking this.
hash_4b38e53518594125: ^1Diego: ^7This 'could' have value. If not, I will give it to the Frenchman.
hash_4b52539e7c1c576a: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not going to ask how this happened, Bruno - but I'm guessing you put up a good fight!
hash_4b7df23eb95b68f4: Press [{+activate}] to convert to Radiance Ammo [Cost: &&1]
hash_4b8bdd204cad3c7c: ^1Diego: ^7...He does know those things trying to kill him are real, right?
hash_4b8bde204cad3e2f: ^1Bruno: ^7Close your good eye Shaw - They might think you are one of them.
hash_4bb8334a155e7409: ^1Diego: ^7Keep calm. Keep firing. Do not let them win...
hash_4bb8344a155e75bc: ^1Shaw: ^7Gah! My heart--! It...    ...feels better than it has in years!
hash_4c02f36d1ba0834b: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh. You got him right in the Gigglemug, Scarlett!
hash_4c02f86d1ba08bca: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, very impressive, Scarlett.     But can you do it again... And again?... And Again?
hash_4c02f96d1ba08d7d: ^1Bruno: ^7My former recruits could have learned a few things from Mademoiselle Rhodes.

hash_4c5f8e23d8258199: Pack-a-Punch Machine is in the Turbine Room
hash_4ca26a174da9031a: ^1Narrator: ^7Running out of ammo isn't something you want to happen in Zombies. Bad things tend to follow.
hash_4cbe66619320bae4: ^1Narrator: ^7Now you know how to use your weapons, try to clear out the zombies in this room.
hash_4cc4146339e176f0: ^1Diego: ^7Thank you, Scarlett. Now you say, 'De nada.'    And I do mean nada.
hash_4cc4156339e178a3: ^1Bruno: ^7Not my first time being saved by a member of the Rhodes Family.    Merci.
hash_4cc41b6339e182d5: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I must've tripped on something. Terribly sorry to cause a fuss.
hash_4cf723838b81d27b: ^1Diego: ^7Someone is running a scam. Were I not on the receiving end, I think I might actually admire it.
hash_4d2905316e1e4044: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to the Cargo Hold. [Cost: &&1]
hash_4d37a958bd1c00ce: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh that's Marvellous! Absolutely first class. Thank you so much.
hash_4d37ab58bd1c0434: ^1Bruno: ^7Soldiers deserve the best weaponry available. It is only right.
hash_4d37ac58bd1c05e7: ^1Diego: ^7A more powerful weapon? I can think of no one who deserves it more than I!
hash_4d37ae58bd1c094d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not sure I want to know what's going on the other side of this 'portal'...
hash_4d68f71cebb352a8: B5E.xzBeąčÍĻýŽ,tÕēd”hģŲE-ÍĎeņ4F.úķí[{j≠1á≠ ÜĮ.†Ń≥™≤ÉB:ŔÕ°göó 9≠Į«čÔ onal with these chupa carnes.
hash_4dd580a531cbb426: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4F.úķí[{j≠1á≠ ÜĮ.†Ń≥™≤ÉB:ŔÕ°göó 9≠Į«čÔ onal with these chupa carnes.
hash_4e0bb437dc2fcce8: ^1Scarlett: ^7This would good for breaking stuff down in the junk yard.
hash_4e0bb637dc2fd04e: ^1Diego: ^7It is rather unwieldy... And I speak as a great fan of wielding.
hash_4e0bb737dc2fd201: ^1Bruno: ^7I am familiar with overkill. This is not overkill.
hash_4e0bb937dc2fd567: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh boy, I'm about to give those beasts a proper thrashing!
hash_4e0ee97ffcbd2997: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you hear that?     I did! Sounds a tad ominous, doesn't it?    Yes! Very!
hash_4e1403b275eac2b8: ^1Diego: ^7I will take no pleasure in this... Other than the parts I enjoy.
hash_4e1404b275eac46b: ^1Bruno: ^7In days gone by, I would have relished such power.
hash_4e140ab275eace9d: ^1Shaw: ^7With this power, I could erase ALL my enemies from the world!    I better get a move on - I've got a list as long as your arm.
hash_4e22fa6fbdcb24c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7This day, this week, this whole month better not get any worse.
hash_4e30322d5f2a2a4c: ^1Narrator: ^7Craftable items like this are just waiting to be found all over a Zombies map.  You can keep track of what you've collected on the Inventory Screen.
hash_4e339ae31cbcd988: ^1Bruno: ^7At least when you attack as a horde, you will not suffer the indignity of dying alone.
hash_4e339be31cbcdb3b: ^1Diego: ^7Normally, I welcome attention and adoration - but you do not look like my usual admirers.
hash_4e339de31cbcdea1: ^1Scarlett: ^7In about 5 seconds, you're gonna lose something you care about.
hash_4e33a0e31cbce3ba: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not afraid. Not even when death is staring down at me like a big eyeball.
hash_4e45c295a14b62e4: ^1Diego: ^7Oh bueno, let me just walk around with a bomb on my shoulder. Perfectly safe.
hash_4e49e37fbbb95378: ^1Scarlett: ^7That went exactly as planned. Yep - I totally planned that way.
hash_4e49e57fbbb956de: ^1Diego: ^7Si... Now that is what I like to hear.
hash_4e49e87fbbb95bf7: ^1Shaw: ^7That actually worked? Is that good? It is?? are you sure?    YES! I knew it!
hash_4e595a7d720e162b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tell me you don't need help Bruno -  I'd be pretty damn disappointed if you did.
hash_4e595c7d720e1991: ^1Diego: ^7I must confess, I am eager to witness just how violent Bruno can become.
hash_4e595d7d720e1b44: ^1Shaw: ^7You know Bruno - It's probably best not to let yourself get surrounded. Didn't they teach you that at... soldier school?

hash_4e7f88fa333fde04: ^1Scarlett: ^7I will kill each and everyone of you dead-brain creeps with my fingernails if I have to!
hash_4f017edcaa70c3b0: ^1Bruno: ^7Shaw, that looked suspiciously like your personal syringe.    ...oh merde.
hash_4f017fdcaa70c563: ^1Diego: ^7Why do I suddenly feel like I ate the gusano? Shaw... what was in that medicine?
hash_4f0181dcaa70c8c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ta, Stanton. Now how about we focus on finishing this?
hash_4f10e677a45b256e: ^1Bruno: ^7A team is only as strong as its weakest member...     We should help Shaw.
hash_4f10e777a45b2721: ^1Diego: ^7Do not feel ashamed. We all - well, most of us - make mistakes.
hash_4f10e877a45b28d4: ^1Shaw: ^7I'll have you back on your feet in two shakes of a lamb's tail.
hash_4f2d559ef524ce38: ^1Diego: ^7You seem so familiar...    Dios Mio. Lady McKendrick?? Is that you??
hash_4f2d569ef524cfeb: ^1Bruno: ^7I will pull that tongue from your throat, monstre!
hash_4f2d579ef524d19e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm getting real tired of this guy's pug-ugly mug.
hash_4f2d5c9ef524da1d: ^1Shaw: ^7I see my ex-wife has graced us with her presence again...
hash_4f2f1ff28207c069: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to balance the scales of life and death.
hash_4f836a6ff2e57048: ^1Scarlett: ^7Smells like burnt dogshit, but worth it!
hash_4f836c6ff2e573ae: ^1Diego: ^7I was told to only use this 'for good.'    Look at all the good I'm doing!

hash_5390789f21fd854a: ^1Bruno: ^7Can you see how the icy ones empower the others? This has to stop!
hash_5390799f21fd86fd: ^1Diego: ^7The sneaky one strengthens its friends. See how it makes their eyes blue?
hash_5397396709971a2f: ^1Diego: ^7You may be looking in the wrong places, Scarlett. My flippancy and general lust for life are some of the qualities Senor Rhodes admired most about me.     I had hoped you would feel the same way.

hash_547b79fa5c82fa2c: ^1Diego: ^7I am wise enough to know that I am dealing with powers far beyond my understanding.
hash_547b7afa5c82fbdf: ^1Bruno: ^7The powers behind these 'machines' could change the world for the better... Or destroy it.

hash_558e2e60d59a2787: ^1Shaw: ^7I really should have been more careful with all those bullets. Too late now.

hash_55b69787329ca54a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Honestly? As in the no horse shit answer? I didn't know things would get this bad, but I knew I'd probably need some muscle. Hence... You know...     You.

hash_56d99b3bc07a0dc4: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter how much we try to fortify our defenses, this vessel is no fortress.
hash_56d99e3bc07a12dd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Any reason they can't always do that?
hash_5712ed7af0d2a1a9: ^1Shaw: ^7Little sniff to straighten the body... and the mind...    Wait - how did I get here??! Am I on a boat??! Is that the fucking ocean??!
hash_5712ee7af0d2a35c: ^1Diego: ^7Is it supposed to smell like that?!
hash_5712ef7af0d2a50f: ^1Bruno: ^7Ahhhhh yes. I enjoyed that. Very much.
hash_5712f07af0d2a6c2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, that's got my engine throbbing.      I could run around the deck for hours.
hash_57199fcd31c6149a: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! Think I blew out an ear drum!
hash_5720c0eb7ca8b442: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like the Engine room's still operational... but what is powering it?
hash_5794ef0d37b9a49f: ^1Scarlett: ^7As a kid I believed my father's stories. As an adult I believed him full of it.     Now I don't know what to believe.
hash_57a92323d492a43c: ^1Narrator: ^7This is a zombie. You should kill it.
hash_57dc099e146e96b8: ^1Bruno: ^7I seek no payment for my actions.    I seek only my own survival.
hash_57dc0c9e146e9bd1: ^1Scarlett: ^7It may not be much, but it's something.
hash_57dc0f9e146ea0ea: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Evelyn?? I am a rich man! A rich man indeed!
hash_57f351c647fff0e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7What, you think you look scarier with only one arm?   You're right.
hash_57f353c647fff446: ^1Diego: ^7If your arm offends thee, cut it off.' That is the quote, yes?     Well, it offended me, amigo.
hash_57f354c647fff5f9: ^1Bruno: ^7Quoi? I aimed for its head, not its arm!
hash_57f356c647fff95f: ^1Shaw: ^7What is the sound of one hand clapping?    No, seriously, now's our big chance to find out!

hash_582f23cbb46e44cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're only making this harder on yourself, shorty.

hash_58372af092d5230c: ^1Scarlett: ^7You know you guys stink something rotten when you all group together.
hash_58372cf092d52672: ^1Diego: ^7Look, amigos! Even more bestias too foolish to realize they
hash_58372df092d52825: ^1Bruno: ^7By attacking in numbers, you only hasten your demise.

hash_587f419619a04fa7: ^1Bruno: ^7Sometimes it pays to bring a snake to a knife fight.
hash_587f429619a0515a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Somebody's gotta whip you freaks into shape!

hash_589f421fcf2f85cf: P: mŻĘ@:tt: ^7Holy shit... Anyone else see the rampage Bruno's just unleashed?
hash_589f441fcf2f8935: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno is like a hammer... Cracking a tiny little walnut!
hash_58a95a421c36434b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Surprise! It's not just a walking stick!
hash_58a95c421c3646b1: ^1Diego: ^7That was for your own good. And my amusement.
hash_58a95d421c364864: ^1Shaw: ^7It heals our allies. It kills our enemies. Such a fine line to walk.
hash_58cec10cf47d11cb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shake it off, Scar. Forget what he said on page 4. Forget everything the old man said.       Concentrate on the now.
hash_58cf05c82cd8feeb: ^1Scarlett: ^7So - I guess stuff just does whatever it wants on this ship...
hash_58e6295c90c5da01: ^1Shaw: ^7Certainly don't get storms like this in London.
hash_58e62b5c90c5dd67: ^1Bruno: ^7My life has always been a maelstrom. Come, taste my pain!
hash_5976db6b5de79700: ^1Scarlett: ^7I recognize that smell - Paint stripper?!     Isn't that shit corrosive?!
hash_5976dd6b5de79a66: ^1Diego: ^7My lungs feel as though they are being stabbed by a thousand tiny, knife wielding icicles.
hash_5976de6b5de79c19: ^1Bruno: ^7I feel cold. Empty.     Not for the first time. Not for the last.
hash_5976e06b5de79f7f: ^1Shaw: ^7"You've got a couple of bits of string hanging from your shirt... No hang on - THOSE ARE YOUR ARMS!"    My brother everyone.
hash_597cb85b60c7a9d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Bugger! I think you just popped one of my buttons.
hash_597cbb5b60c7aeec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't I warn you before? Too late now, fucker!
hash_597cbe5b60c7b405: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you a fool, monstre? You look like a fool.
hash_59818f4ee252a328: ^1Bruno: ^7Redemption is no longer an option - for you, or for me.
hash_5981904ee252a4db: ^1Diego: ^7Like my assignment in Monte Carlo... It was not blood that left me drenched.
hash_5981924ee252a841: ^1Scarlett: ^7From now on - Every bitch-bastard of you that jumps overboard is getting off easy.
hash_5981954ee252ad5a: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't even recognize some of these organs! What was that little round one?
hash_599ab0835edbfb4e: ^1Shaw: ^7I think we're pretty much at the mercy of whatever this *cabinet of abominations* deems to chuck at us.
hash_599ab2835edbfeb4: ^1Bruno: ^7Even a rifle such as this may not be enough against the legions of the damned who now walk this ship.
hash_599ab3835edc0067: ^1Diego: ^7Judging by the weight alone, this weapon should ensure my survival for at least a few minutes.
hash_599ab5835edc03cd: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see a barrel... a trigger... And a lot of rounds.
hash_59a78d3fe43d597a: ^1Narrator: ^7Try bringing up your shield. It can deflect attacks from the front. Plus, you can fire your pistol while the shield's equipped.
hash_59abdbce5a04ea90: ^1Shaw: ^7Wow. How far away was he?! At least 10 feet. Probably more!
hash_59abe1ce5a04f4c2: ^1Bruno: ^7When you do it ten times in a row, Diego - then you can brag.
hash_59c1a724cdc545a8: T÷ň¬hß›]N,1…ÝÚĮüõ ŖŹŗ(ŤķOé¨ŗbHsų∑ųwÝ√Sime. None were like this.
hash_59c1a824cdc5475b: ^1Diego: ^7The hordes grow ever larger - so too should our arsenal.
hash_59c1aa24cdc54ac1: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a hell of a piece of engineering. Wish it came with a manual.
hash_59c1ad24cdc54fda: ^1Shaw: ^7One thing I know for sure - it's never a good idea to operate machinery while... While...    In my condition.
hash_59d24ea0cd4ae7a8: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw, did you ever consider I was enjoying the floor?
hash_59d24fa0cd4ae95b: ^1Bruno: ^7Is there not a real doctor on this ship?
hash_59e34558ae5fb46e: ^1Diego: ^7Have you admired the floor lately? It looks lovely down there.
hash_59e34658ae5fb621: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps you should have left me there, for I deserve no better.
hash_59e34858ae5fb987: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, you're quite right. This is no time for a nap.
hash_59fa9ec9b58c5058: ^1Scarlett: ^7No one cares whether you fucking live or die. Do you hear me??      NO-ONE!!
hash_59faa1c9b58c5571: ^1Bruno: ^7Those who still oppose me should prepare for your graves.
hash_59faa3c9b58c58d7: ^1Shaw: ^7How many was that I offed? I counted at least three.
hash_59fdc036eaa26065: ^1Narrator: ^7Each craftable has its own assigned workbench somewhere in the map.   Now, let's build a shield.
hash_5a01eb28bfde609b: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't want to play favorites, but you've had this coming for a while.
hash_5a01ee28bfde65b4: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're pretty much bow wow mutton at this point.
hash_5a01f028bfde691a: ^1Diego: ^7I'm not a petty man by nature, but you were starting to push my buttons.
hash_5a01f128bfde6acd: ^1Bruno: ^7A life of violence almost always leads to a violent end.
hash_5a090529d4585fbb: ^1Shaw: ^7More ammunition!    I was Happy to pay for it. Not a word of a lie.
hash_5a090829d45864d4: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm just a normal gal, purchasing bullets from a wall. Totally normal.
hash_5a090a29d458683a: ^1Diego: ^7Now, where was I?... Ah yes, fighting for my life.
hash_5a090b29d45869ed: ^1Bruno: ^7I expect to do this again - and sooner than I would like.
hash_5a28a2f70d2f9fee: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I could be about to win my first actual fight.
hash_5a28a4f70d2fa354: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps a quick death is an act of mercy for such monstres.
hash_5a28a5f70d2fa507: ^1Diego: ^7If I - and Madero himself - had held such power, it would have been a very short revolution indeed.
hash_5a28a7f70d2fa86d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not only am I ready, but I am EAGER to kick ass.
hash_5a3ab89fa0fef63e: ^1Diego: ^7...do you not have anything a little more straightforward? Not *too* straightforward, though. I know, I am picky.
hash_5a3ab99fa0fef7f1: ^1Bruno: ^7Very advanced. At least it still fires bullets.
hash_5a3abb9fa0fefb57: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not even sure how this works. Presumably it's still point and pull the trigger?
hash_5a3c88bf58181140: ^1Scarlett: ^7That man's oversized ego is going to get him killed.
hash_5a3c8bbf58181659: ^1Bruno: ^7I suppose I could help Diego before he dies a terrible death. But then he would learn nothing.
hash_5a3c8dbf581819bf: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm going to time how long it takes you to kill them all Diego. Ready? GO!
hash_5a52b65583f3aaf3: ^1Bruno: ^7That may prove to be a costly misstep.
hash_5a52b75583f3aca6: ^1Scarlett: ^7This voyage is turning into one disaster after another.

hash_5a70a1e597caeb27: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett! What did you get me into?!
hash_5a761a9e87a4f938: ^1Scarlett: ^7Now wait a damn minute. I paid my money. How come you're changing the rules?
hash_5a761c9e87a4fc9e: ^1Diego: ^7This is an act of disrespect I will not forget - nor forgive.
hash_5a761d9e87a4fe51: ^1Bruno: ^7I myself have been forced to dispose of bodies in what you could call 'imaginative' ways.
hash_5a761f9e87a501b7: ^1Shaw: ^7Look at my face - do I look like someone who's used to having good things happen?
hash_5a97593761abb441: ^1Narrator: ^7Nice. Now pick up the shield off the bench.
hash_5a9cb2f99e6b390e: ^1Shaw: ^7The Viper and the Dragon. Rather poetic names, don't you think?     Come figure out which is which.
hash_5a9cb4f99e6b3c74: ^1Bruno: ^7I have two different flavors of oblivion for you. Now get in line.
hash_5a9cb5f99e6b3e27: ^1Diego: ^7In battle and in the bedroom, two is always better than one.
hash_5a9cb7f99e6b418d: ^1Scarlett: ^7No idle hands here, but I did bring along the Devil's tools.
hash_5ab37b47f0dff895: ^1Bruno: ^7Your father's work was never pointless - He believed in *something*.     So much so that he gave up the thing most precious to him in search of it.
hash_5ad307dbfbe66c92: ^1Narrator: ^7You've been given all of your elixirs, so let's try one out. Activate the 'Anywhere But Here' elixir.
hash_5aecc7aab64ac5be: ^1Diego: ^7Can anyone tell me what on earth that thing is?
hash_5aef098f12d2ee26: ^1Diego: ^7Instant transportation from danger? I could have used that last July. There was no escaping Valentina's wrath.
hash_5aef0a8f12d2efd9: ^1Bruno: ^7Que se passe-t-il? Am I still in one piece?
hash_5aef0c8f12d2f33f: ^1Shaw: ^7Fucking hell! Where are my organs? Why can I only feel one kidney?... Oh right, there's only one.
hash_5b6a4c36df9369b6: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Boat Deck [Cost: &&1]
hash_5b7ccafd06f7985c: ^1Diego: ^7What can I say? Sparks fly wherever I go.
hash_5b7ccbfd06f79a0f: ^1Bruno: ^7I swear I will cleanse this whole ship!
hash_5bb8a41e1e26da12: ^1Scarlett: ^7Good news skin-scabs! I'll be going hand to hand pretty soon.
hash_5c125dcda9f78b33: ^1Diego: ^7Do not fret, bestia, I think that 'no face' may be a better look for you.
hash_5c125fcda9f78e99: ^1Scarlett: ^7Run around all you want scab-heads, you still get a headshot.
hash_5c1262cda9f793b2: ^1Shaw: ^7That was almost as satisfying as threading a needle.     And I didn't even have to lick it first.
hash_5c3498bab03c69c9: ^1Shaw: ^7Bravo, Senor Necalli!     Don't know why I'm congratulating him... I could do the same thing if I tried hard enough.
hash_5c349abab03c6d2f: ^1Bruno: ^7You are fortunate that you need not mourn those you have slain, Diego!
hash_5c349bbab03c6ee2: ^1Scarlett: ^7We all get it, Diego - you're slicker than an engine oil spill.
hash_5c783687a5358536: ^1Shaw: ^7What? Really? You think I carry that kind of coin?
hash_5c783887a535889c: ^1Bruno: ^7Wealth was never a problem for me. Lack of wealth on the other hand...
hash_5c783987a5358a4f: ^1Diego: ^7This...thing demands payment. I overthrew such naked greed in Mexico. I will do the same here.
hash_5c783b87a5358db5: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can't make this work without payment? Helluva racket they're running here...
hash_5c7ad1c3a643f703: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened to 'The Great Diego Necalli never makes mistakes'?
hash_5c7f2052291c6fbe: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you see which one got me? Cheeky bugger's going to pay...
hash_5c7f2252291c7324: ^1Bruno: ^7Why do I feel you are helping me just to rub it in my face?
hash_5c7f2552291c783d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just for that, I'll stifle the next three insults that pop into my head.     Done. You're fair game again.
hash_5c859bb3cfc40eeb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Launch this at the right time and we'll catch a lucky break. Unless I sinks the ship.
hash_5c859cb3cfc4109e: ^1Bruno: ^7There is a danger this could cause further structural damage to the ship.
hash_5c859db3cfc41251: ^1Diego: ^7With weapons like this, I fear war will one day become more commonplace than love.
hash_5c859eb3cfc41404: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not sure what will kill me first. A clumsy misfire or a clumsy trip down the stairs.
hash_5c9cea9cfd4902ac: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay bone-basket, I won't shoot you for that one.
hash_5cc31b55f95a6b9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Could everyone just shut their yaps and concentrate on securing the area?!      I was told I could trust you. Can you please show me that my father wasn
hash_5cd62955ef13019d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tell me you don't need help Bruno -  I'd be pretty disappointed if you did.
hash_5cdc6fca4c4523ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe if you lay off the 'medicine' you could do that more often, Shaw!
hash_5cdc71ca4c452752: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw! Do you know what you just did? It was good! Feel free to do it again!
hash_5cdc72ca4c452905: ^1Bruno: ^7Imagine what you could achieve with a clear head... my brain addled friend.
hash_5d27177118494374: ^1Diego: ^7I have crossed paths - and swords -  with our enemy before. They sought to take my medallion - and now we know why.
hash_5dac668eecaa2028: ^1Diego: ^7I shall hold this blade aloft - so the glint from the night stars may blind my enemies.
hash_5dac678eecaa21db: ^1Bruno: ^7I have used such a knife before. Mostly for cooking meat beneath the blistering desert sun.
hash_5dac688eecaa238e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've slept with a knife under my pillow since I was 13.
hash_5dac6d8eecaa2c0d: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful!     I could have someone's eye out with this!
hash_5db59d42b6f19c51: ^1Shaw: ^7We must find fresh munitions! If only so I can avoid the indignity of dying.
hash_5db59e42b6f19e04: ^1Diego: ^7Maybe I should just use what's left of my ammo and go down in a blaze of glory.
hash_5db5a042b6f1a16a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Few more rounds - I should make them count.
hash_5de2aa8056027fee: öˇ-\aĪźŖr‹	H\a’{B≤‹8†8Š¶éaąE"Ģķ¶b#Īĺš…íýnčÝżXŌĺˇzķřŚ	ā āÄďa•ćpPńMbkńėfĮ^;™ŇűbŤh¬Oįaų3 “ūíôĹ£'Vcarlett: ^7Is that rotten stiff supposed to be leaking gas?     You can smell it from here.
hash_5de9dee0c0a470e5: ˇzķřŚ	ā āÄďa•ćpPńMbkńėfĮ^;™ŇűbŤh¬Oįaų3 “ūíôĹ£'Vcarlett: ^7Is that rotten stiff supposed to be leaking gas?     You can smell it from here.
hash_5e08899c5cade06b: 'Vcarlett: ^7Is that rotten stiff supposed to be leaking gas?     You can smell it from here.
hash_5e088a9c5cade21e: ^1Bruno: ^7Stay back! That gassy shrieker is a walking contagion!
hash_5e088b9c5cade3d1: ^1Diego: ^7Just when you think the dead cannot smell any worse...
hash_5e088c9c5cade584: ^1Shaw: ^7There! You see! That's what I feel like when I eat a curry!
hash_5e476e716ce7ccc8: ^1Diego: ^7I knew there was a reason I hated that little blue rat.
hash_5e476f716ce7ce7b: ^1Bruno: ^7That sneaking little runt. Keep it away from the others!
hash_5e4775716ce7d8ad: ^1Shaw: ^7That little blue rat's on my last nerve...
hash_5e8bba355eae9de3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah, I know, I know, Shaw. I messed up.
hash_5e8bbb355eae9f96: ^1Bruno: ^7Merci, Shaw. You actually did something right.     Shh. Do not ruin the moment.
hash_5e8bbc355eaea149: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes, we are all having a laugh at Diego. Que chistoso...
hash_5e9747173e85a783: ^1Shaw: ^7Hello?! Anyone else here?     Just to be crystal clear - I don't want to hear from those of you who might identify as... *necrotic*.
hash_5e974a173e85ac9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay. The artifacts are gone. What now? Why couldn't I have had a normal father?
hash_5e974c173e85b002: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno? Are you there my French friend? We should try to stay together - it would be better for all of us.     However many are left.
hash_5e974d173e85b1b5: ^1Bruno: ^7So not everyone is dead. Some are... somewhere... inbetween.     I will do something. I always do something.
hash_5e9f6d419484b90e: ^1Diego: ^7You fought well, burning man.     I kid, I kid. You made an ox look graceful.
hash_5e9f6e419484bac1: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not like these stokers. They remind me too much of the man I used to be.
hash_5e9f70419484be27: ^1Shaw: ^7It exploded! Damn it, I was hoping to examine his remains.
hash_5effd2a30197528a: ^1Scarlett: ^7A gun from a wall. That's...that's just...  (to self, stern)  Okay, Scarlett, don't over-think it, just take the gun.
hash_5f31185b1673a29b: ^1Narrator: ^7If you decide what's on offer is a downgrade, you don't have to take it.   Just remember: you have a limited window of time to grab the weapon. Once it's back in the box, it's gone.
hash_5f49b1e9ec40090f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, what the?? Is that made from people??
hash_5f68584f6fa1f4ae: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know where this weird box is getting these guns... but I'm not complaining.
hash_5f852eccfe81537b: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm a bit poked up, if I'm being honest, Diego.
hash_5f8531ccfe815894: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm never gonna hear the end of this, am I?
hash_5f8534ccfe815dad: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not care what everyone says, Diego, you are good for something.
hash_5f87b97ad6eb6fe8: ^1Diego: ^7As I learned in Constantinople, it is sometimes better to stay far, far away from your enemy.     Next town if needs be.
hash_5f87ba7ad6eb719b: ^1Bruno: ^7A rifle that requires skill, and patience.    The Mexican could never use this.
hash_5f87bb7ad6eb734e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't really have time for target practice. It's the real deal today.
hash_5f87c07ad6eb7bcd: ^1Shaw: ^7Sharpshooting was never really a strong point of mine. Nor Bluntshooting... if such a thing exists.
hash_5fca63c24d916e9b: ^1Shaw: ^7Actually, if you're doing renovations, my lab could really do with a bit of work.
hash_5fca66c24d9173b4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Whoever's putting up these boards really needs to brush up their skills in the workshop.
hash_5fca68c24d91771a: ^1Diego: ^7I am grateful for such assistance - My own talents relate to an altogether different kind of 'Manual labor'.
hash_5fca69c24d9178cd: ^1Bruno: ^7I would recommend using materials stronger than mere driftwood.
hash_5ff28af17671eab9: ^1Shaw: ^7From a far away land to my achy, shaky hands. What could go wrong?
hash_5ff28bf17671ec6c: ^1Diego: ^7A Viper, a Dragon, and a Mexican walk into a bar. There were no survivors.
hash_5ff28cf17671ee1f: ^1Bruno: ^7A cannon and a sword. It's official: I am a pirate.
hash_5ff28df17671efd2: ^1Scarlett: ^7What's not to love? It's a hand cannon and a whip-sword.
hash_605af0ba2e5c1728: ^1Shaw: ^7This is not the end!! I do not drown in vomit!!
hash_605af7ba2e5c230d: ^1Diego: ^7I will kill you for this! Twice!!
hash_605df9a5cbc7e87b: ^1Diego: ^7Odin, if you are watching, save me a seat at your table. I'll bring the tequila.
hash_605dfea5cbc7f0fa: ^1Shaw: ^7Mortar and pestle time. Let's make some medicine...
hash_608704ce34fc6a28: ^1Shaw: ^7They're letting me carry something sharp and something explosive?    Well, I can't be held responsible for the consequences...
hash_608709ce34fc72a7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ever see a dragon and a snake fight? I'll show you what happens.
hash_60870ace34fc745a: ^1Bruno: ^7The Viper bites. The Dragon burns. Come, I will show you.
hash_60870bce34fc760d: ^1Diego: ^7Do I shred this meat or cook it? Porque no los dos?
hash_609466e3a3140f09: ^1Bruno: ^7I am sure you have your reasons for being on the floor. I will not speculate as to what they are.
hash_609468e3a314126f: ^1Shaw: ^7What are you doing there, Diego? Is it some kind of top secret mission?
hash_609f4dec811e7660: ^1Shaw: ^7If things go pear shaped, there's always the Viper and Dragon.
hash_609f52ec811e7edf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Viper and Dragon feel good to go.
hash_609f53ec811e8092: ^1Bruno: ^7I have a mystic sword and gun. Surprisingly easy to forget in the heat of battle.
hash_609f54ec811e8245: ^1Diego: ^7Viper and Dragon, I love you both equally.     No, really.
hash_60be1fdc96c4d1f8: ^1Shaw: ^7I honestly thought their flesh and bone would break before my shield did.
hash_60be24dc96c4da77: ^1Scarlett: ^7That shield was the toughest I could build, given the quality of the materials.
hash_60be25dc96c4dc2a: ^1Bruno: ^7I would be wise to secure another shield.
hash_60be26dc96c4dddd: ^1Diego: ^7I won't blame the build quality. It really did take quite the pounding.
hash_60cb7078f7d454a5: 6•ē®xŲ^«)úŖZŽzĽ-tÔŹČ ≤ßY ŠŇ^1Shaw: ^7Not only is my past drowned in blood - My future continues to bathe in it...
hash_60de8024fe42f2f9: ^1Shaw: ^7Not only is my past drowned in blood - My future continues to bathe in it...
hash_60de8124fe42f4ac: ^1Diego: ^7How curious... I do not believe I  seen a model such as this before.
hash_60de8224fe42f65f: ^1Bruno: ^7This is unlike any cavalry rifle I have ever seen.
hash_60de8324fe42f812: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a mean looking long rifle.
hash_6134f96bfd8584b9: Unlock the Engine Room to Use This Fast Travel
hash_61389b520136b4d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that's maybe just a tad too strong.
hash_61389e520136b9ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Doesn't taste good, but it gets the job done.
hash_6138a0520136bd52: ^1Diego: ^7Are these elixirs supposed to be warm...    And chewy?
hash_6138a1520136bf05: ^1Bruno: ^7With all the magic fighting against us... I welcome any magic that helps us fight back.
hash_613aa922b7ed7d24: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I need - And just what those brain-dead creeps don't.
hash_613de36f469d4c5b: ^1Diego: ^7Ah si, this is just what I need! If I want to annoy them to death.
hash_615caa223452ecf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well. Shaw's gonna die.   I'll mourn him later. If I remember.
hash_615cab223452eeaa: ^1Bruno: ^7We should help the old man. He is fragile. I think his entire body weighs less than my left arm.
hash_615cac223452f05d: ^1Diego: ^7Only an Englishman could make 'Life threatening danger' look so dull.
hash_618f097f4ac2441e: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody hell, Deigo - You went through them like grass through a goose!
hash_618f0b7f4ac24784: ^1Bruno: ^7I could applaud, Diego. But it would only feed your ego.
hash_618f0e7f4ac24c9d: ^1Scarlett: ^7My Father made a lot of weird friends Diego. I think he collected you like stray animals.
hash_619b98f283f9fd9c: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh no... I'm getting flashbacks - horrible ones at that.    It's really starting to feel like that terrible Cambodia business all over again.
hash_61c6d3708a1c0978: ^1Bruno: ^7Well...at least it is a kinder fate than remaining a coal-monster.
hash_61c6d4708a1c0b2b: ^1Diego: ^7Did you see that? I was all whish-bang-crack-thump!    That is definitely going in my next adventure novel.
hash_61c6d6708a1c0e91: ^1Scarlett: ^7Stay down, hot-stuff. The last thing this ship needs is a fire.
hash_61c6d9708a1c13aa: ^1Shaw: ^7Like carrying coals to Newcastle.' That was you, mate.
hash_61dc809f88e9f38b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't try that with me! I will cut you bad.
hash_6208942bcbbe4e11: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Boat Deck
hash_620ab73a8fb72e51: ^1Shaw: ^7At this rate, I'll owe more to you than your father when this is over...
hash_620ab93a8fb731b7: ^1Bruno: ^7Careful, girl. If they can pull down a brute like moi, none of us are safe.
hash_62291099bd2792b6: ^1Shaw: ^7You ready, Hammer? Time for a good whacking.
hash_625a87a514aee98e: ^1Shaw: ^7Given your limited language skills, it is possible your attacks are an attempt to say hello!     I should probably say hello back!
hash_625a89a514aeecf4: ^1Bruno: ^7My body is strong, and I have no ego to bruise.     Unlike Diego.
hash_625a8ca514aef20d: ^1Scarlett: ^7You keep asking for it, bub! Now you get to see what happens. I'll give you a clue - It'll hurt.
hash_626e40f66800b382: ^1Bruno: ^7Did your father also tell you of what befell us beneath the Basilica Cistern?     How he... Resurrected me?
hash_62ae1c4f8ac4e714: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Poop Deck
hash_62c4dfcfd66e9583: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's not natural... It can't be. Even Shaw couldn't come up with something that noxious.
hash_62c4e0cfd66e9736: ^1Bruno: ^7I smell burning engines. Surely that cannot be good.
hash_62c4e1cfd66e98e9: ^1Diego: ^7This was the kick-start my heart needed to recover from the tragedy that befell Lady McKendrick.
hash_62c4e2cfd66e9a9c: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh... It's like getting a bit snow up the nose.
hash_62dc1876ba62214e: ^1Shaw: ^7Maybe you've taken a bit too much medicine, Shaw. That wall just sold you a firearm.
hash_62dc1a76ba6224b4: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter where I go, it seems life wants me to solve all my problems with the pull of a trigger.
hash_62dc1b76ba622667: ^1Diego: ^7The Trial puts us under siege, but also aids us. Is someone watching this? For what? Entertainment?
hash_62dc1d76ba6229cd: ^1Scarlett: ^7As a kid I believed my father's stories. As an adult I believed him full of shit.     Now I don't know what to believe.
hash_62f963bb6edfcb21: ^1Shaw: ^7It's a bit brisk out tonight, should probably put a coat on. WAIT! WHAT ON EARTH IS GOING ON?!
hash_6320dab04485de6e: ^1Bruno: ^7Each time I am double-crossed, my patience wears ever more thin.
hash_6320dbb04485e021: ^1Diego: ^7I am humble in defeat. I still have much for which I'm grateful.
hash_6320dcb04485e1d4: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm watching this pile of bones and meat-matter carefully this time...     Bollocks!
hash_633520e3fc25afff: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been ripped across time and space!!     Oh no, I'm still on the ship. Super.
hash_638297e9a597e61a:  ńp≠„|»ńűYŲĹ\a-Ūā•©ŮS[H›√+ļA…\1j”bŅbŚúF©/$ōJŗ¨ūī…BŚąÓ6Żf3“6[•Ļž X∑ę—@Őo… ňĹęįóo]\a’ĻiôKcōēĆ\vôŪę'“ēőv @£Ó¬Ť•mŪ7‹: NB
hash_63a2b2cc387d30ac: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not know how many more of those we can take.
hash_63a2b5cc387d35c5: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I never see your puke-spouting face again, that's a win in my book.
hash_63c0d7d0201bc2b0: ^1Diego: ^7Wow-ee! You can definitely tell that was made somewhere south of the border...
hash_63c0d9d0201bc616: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the Hell did I just inhale?     Frosted glass?!
hash_63c0ded0201bce95: ^1Shaw: ^7Amazing how different you feel after a whiff of this.    I reckon I could DOMINATE at tiddly-winks right now.
hash_63e5ef81f4ea51b8: ^1Diego: ^7I am slightly surprised that you do not bleed more.
hash_63e5f681f4ea5d9d: ^1Shaw: ^7Look what you've done to my knife! I'm going to have to clean that!
hash_64279b053bd0fbe3: ^1Narrator: ^7He's going to bleed out if you don't help him.
hash_642d6f3f16abfe69: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm trying to remember Scarlett as a child, and I can't. Same goes for my own family if I'm honest with myself.     Shame on me.
hash_642d703f16ac001c: ^1Diego: ^7Of all my adventures, this is the one that could not possibly be exaggerated.
hash_642d713f16ac01cf: ^1Bruno: ^7My comrades and I are very different people. But we are all bound by our association with Alistair Rhodes.
hash_642d723f16ac0382: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm trying to figure out the patterns - there's a twisted logic to all of this.
hash_65351d1eed95a868: ^1Bruno: ^7We must try to learn from this.
hash_6535201eed95ad81: ^1Scarlett: ^7Luck doesn't even come into it. We should have been smarter.
hash_6535231eed95b29a: ^1Shaw: ^7This absolutely will not stand! I demand a do-over!
hash_6546831e9dfe0508: ^1Shaw: ^7The market is collapsing! Sell! Sell! Sell!     Wait, no that's not right -BUY! From the box!
hash_6546881e9dfe0d87: ^1Scarlett: ^7You hear that? Time to load up and let loose!
hash_6546891e9dfe0f3a: ^1Bruno: ^7An opportunity to procure ourselves better weapon... Or a worse one.
hash_65468a1e9dfe10ed: ^1Diego: ^7With prices so low, one is almost guaranteed to make a killing.
hash_6558d99dee45bbc8: ^1Shaw: ^7You're very good at this Bruno! I'm finding myself feeling a little bit insecure.
hash_6558de9dee45c447: ^1Scarlett: ^7Can't tell if you learned that as a gangster or a soldier, Bruno.
hash_655f56d5efd95945: State Rooms to Millionaire Suites Door Unlocked!
hash_65669d56a1224430: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! I nearly had a tumble. Blood isn't normally that viscous!
hash_6571da6f9e62da8d: ^1Bruno: ^7I only made it angrier. Stupid one-armed monstre.
hash_659dab5e96d1ce3f: ^1Bruno: ^7When I first met your father, he did not impress me greatly, but he entered a time in my life when I needed... change.
hash_65be75ce68607aad: ^1Scarlett: ^7Talk to me Shaw! In the chaos, when everything started changing - you looked like you'd seen it all before.

hash_664d9a66f1de3967: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like my gun's got a little extra 'ooomph'.
hash_664d9b66f1de3b1a: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps there a hidden realm beyond the... 'mirage'.
hash_664d9c66f1de3ccd: ^1Diego: ^7I hope the rapid delivery did not compromise the quality of the workmanship...
hash_666acf321ec30f59: ^1Shaw: ^7I feel like the walls are closing in around me. Is this it? My final moments?!     Nah, I think I'm okay.
hash_666ad0321ec3110c: ^1Diego: ^7Should I pick them off one by one, or vanquish them all in a single explosion?
hash_666ad1321ec312bf: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter the opposition, I will stand my ground.
hash_666ad2321ec31472: ^1Scarlett: ^7Which of you is the strongest? I'll start there and work my way down.
hash_6676519bf2c40bb1: ^1Shaw: ^7A little tingle tells me the Dragon and Viper are ready...to do far worse than tingle...
hash_6676529bf2c40d64: ^1Diego: ^7Ahhhh, Viper and Dragon. My two favorite senoritas.
hash_6676539bf2c40f17: ^1Bruno: ^7I can feel the Viper and Dragon are ready for battle.
hash_6676549bf2c410ca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like Viper and Dragon are champing at the bit.
hash_667ac6a82d429ca4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Get up, Shaw. We need all hands on deck - Even the shaky ones.
hash_667ac8a82d42a00a: ^1Diego: ^7Here you go, Shaw - I hope this is the right medicine for your particular 'ailment'.
hash_667ac9a82d42a1bd: ^1Bruno: ^7I will not abandon you, Shaw. The others? Probably. But me? No.
hash_667ba4278a0cce7e: ^1Shaw: ^7Who's up for a nice game of ring-toss?
hash_667ba7278a0cd397: ^1Diego: ^7Pardon me while I whip these out.
hash_669c0c5deaada19f: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to pick up Concentrated Purity
hash_66b8322fd6769201: ^1Diego: ^7*spits* So bad...I can actually taste it...!
hash_66b8332fd67693b4: ^1Shaw: ^7Doesn't smell that bad. Try me after a week on the pipe. Now that-- whoa-HO-HO, that is something special.
hash_66ceba9ad4c2f986: ^1Shaw: ^7Low ammo.     I'm 99% sure that's not a good thing.
hash_66cebd9ad4c2fe9f: ^1Diego: ^7My weapon is almost empty... I am usually not so careless.
hash_66cebf9ad4c30205: ^1Scarlett: ^7Killing all these freaks sure burns through ammunition.
hash_67290061bd06c97e: ^1Shaw: ^7That "cleared the fog" a bit!?     Maybe too much.
hash_67290261bd06cce4: ^1Bruno: ^7It as though my lungs have been opened.    Possibly literally.
hash_67290361bd06ce97: ^1Diego: ^7A vapor to elevate my senses? Si, por favor. Wooooah!
hash_6737e21a41be7f3c: ^1Scarlett: ^7So does this make me a Valkyrie?
hash_6746d249a8e69558: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah - BURN! Keeps me from getting your nasty guts all over my hands!
hash_679bfb3437a42583: ^1Shaw: ^7GOOD LORD!!! Did everyone else see what just happened?     Wait. It may just be my so called senses deceiving me.     I'll be okay in a minute.
hash_67ac28821d6e07d3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shouldn't you know what you're doing, Shaw? Haven't you fought these things before?
hash_67ac29821d6e0986: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you scared, Shaw? Are you hoping to be ignored if you play dead?
hash_67ac2a821d6e0b39: ^1Diego: ^7You need to pay more attention, amigo. There are many things here that want to hurt you.
hash_67b05f9cecb59b39: ^1Shaw: ^7Oww! Don't you know the face is the second most fragile part of the body?!
hash_67c1475ac990f0f1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll get to every one of you Scab-heads before I'm through...
hash_67ee387c1b877438: ^1Bruno: ^7This brings back memories, memories I wish not to recall.
hash_67ee397c1b8775eb: ^1Diego: ^7It would be so much easier if this contraption just let me choose the weapon I want.
hash_67ee3e7c1b877e6a: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah yes, the shotgun. England's preferred method for addressing a rodent problem.
hash_67fc60e09b45cf03: ^1Shaw: ^7Little sniff to straighten the body... and the mind...     Wait - how did I get here??! Am I on a boat??! Is that the ocean??!
hash_68028ae23a3a976b: ^1Shaw: ^7For a second, I thought I saw a little glint of light from the other side.
hash_68028fe23a3a9fea: ^1Diego: ^7It looks better now, si? Much less ugly  above the neck.
hash_68361f135023f680: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm down! I'm dying! The end! I see light! Getting closer! AHHH!
hash_683624135023feff: ^1Scarlett: ^7This day, this week, this damn month better not get any worse.
hash_68362513502400b2: ^1Bruno: ^7Once more, I am at death's door. This time, Alistair is not here to save me.
hash_6836261350240265: ^1Diego: ^7Hopefully no one saw that. Diego 'The Clumsy' Necalli is not a nickname I wish to acquire.
hash_683a1f700f0d9eb8: ^1Shaw: ^7Double the points, you say?     Well, 'When in Rome', I suppose!
hash_683a25700f0da8ea: ^1Bruno: ^7I have long given up the pursuit of wealth.
hash_683a26700f0daa9d: ^1Diego: ^7Good things come to those who wait.. And those impatient ones who just decide to take them.
hash_6884472e7f24b233: ^1Narrator: ^7That's a good one if you find yourself in a bind - or just fancy a change in scenery.
hash_68a3e2cea5145391: ź58-rTćZ†īä2†ņļÄ—ř5ėu:ļ9ĄŠĀEņńĽ∆\atvšóIĻŤiŲĚ¶ģ“\v5uÝŁIň' @Ťeģ•6w]įšUīu≠A‚\ad÷õ≠Ķć>Ś^GÖ,qěŃE£»[L1Scarlett: ^7I really hope you're not dumb enough to think that was a smart idea.

hash_68ddc521738859cf: L1Scarlett: ^7I really hope you're not dumb enough to think that was a smart idea.
hash_68ddc72173885d35: ^1Diego: ^7You wish to fight, bestia? Mano y mano?
hash_692fd13f4a8b347c: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, so you do not mind losing an arm? Let's see you be so cavalier about losing your face.
hash_692fd23f4a8b362f: ^1Bruno: ^7Why won't you unholy beasts just die??
hash_6988a40621dac345: ^1Narrator: ^7You can switch between the different weapons you have equipped.
hash_69c100e57afe4d4b: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a piece of engineering. Wish it came with a manual.
hash_69d1c05f4094e59d: ^1Narrator: ^7Sprinting will bring you back to your feet..
hash_69de2f9a5782cfce: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Hell! I nearly went arse over tit. Blood isn't normally that viscous!
hash_69de319a5782d334: ^1Bruno: ^7Death is your only way off this ship. It is better that we all accept this fact.
hash_69de329a5782d4e7: ^1Diego: ^7I feel as though this killing streak is building toward a grand crescendo!
hash_69ea9e52494c915f: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4FäŖQJę≠|Ň∆iäĆÖy#éí:í“3úżėęĽPĖA^1Diego: ^7Now - I am no fool. You know *something* of what is unfolding on this vessel, Scarlett.     Which leads me to ask -     How much - exactly - did your father explain in his letter?
hash_69eb0711818512f1: ^1Diego: ^7Now - I am no fool. You know *something* of what is unfolding on this vessel, Scarlett.     Which leads me to ask -     How much - exactly - did your father explain in his letter?
hash_6a0b70a86ed2aaae: ^1Bruno: ^7It is best not to dwell on moment of happiness - it will be fleeting.
hash_6a0b71a86ed2ac61: ^1Diego: ^7Such success is my gift to you all. You can thank me later.
hash_6a0b72a86ed2ae14: ^1Shaw: ^7A win is a win is a win is a win.
hash_6a166a9bb51df48e: ^1Shaw: ^7Mmm. Tastes like bleach and glue.     I should probably try to improve on that.
hash_6a166c9bb51df7f4: ^1Bruno: ^7I wonder if Shaw is familiar with Absinthe? Who am I kidding, he probably has it with breakfast.
hash_6a166d9bb51df9a7: ^1Diego: ^7May this elixir imbue me with power...    And... nothing... else.
hash_6a166f9bb51dfd0d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just a shot of liquid courage.   Mostly courage.
hash_6a1fe81859c918f9: ^1Shaw: ^7An inanimate object manifests a complex mechanism out of thin air, and...    Wait a tick, it also TOOK. MY. MONEY!
hash_6a1fe91859c91aac: ^1Diego: ^7I wonder what else the walls are selling tonight. Any tequila?
hash_6a1fea1859c91c5f: ^1Bruno: ^7If my journeys with Alistair taught me anything, it is not to question the unexplainable.
hash_6a1feb1859c91e12: ^1Scarlett: ^7I guess this is the new normal. Long as it keeps me alive...
hash_6a2dbf40496a4d33: ^1Shaw: ^7Well of course that worked out exactly as planned. How could it not?
hash_6a2dc240496a524c: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's a step in the right direction. One. Literally.
hash_6a2dc440496a55b2: ^1Diego: ^7Success was only to be expected. I am Diego Necalli, after all.
hash_6a2dc540496a5765: ^1Bruno: ^7A moment of success does not mean we have time to rejoice.
hash_6a49b49a7c4ee06e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Your big fat mouth get you in trouble again, Diego?
hash_6a49b99a7c4ee8ed: ^1Shaw: ^7Is this the climax of your story Diego? If you die at the end, I don't want to know.
hash_6a815827f1f1ed6b: ^1Narrator: ^7Special weapons gain their charge from killing zombies - They'll get stronger the more you use them.
hash_6a8b74b1c95f88e8: ^1Diego: ^7No one wrongs Diego Necalli, and lives to tell the tale.
hash_6a8b75b1c95f8a9b: ^1Bruno: ^7Your death should be a warning for the others.
hash_6a8b76b1c95f8c4e: ^1Scarlett: ^7You may not remember why, but trust me - you deserved that.
hash_6a93e800d6219d27: ^1Shaw: ^7Haven't smelled anything that foul since I soiled the bed.
hash_6aa7c0326197e303: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly?  I'm just pissing in the wind here...
hash_6aa7c3326197e81c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's see if these stay up longer than the last ones did.
hash_6aa7c5326197eb82: ^1Diego: ^7I feel this is akin to trying to dam a river with only twigs.
hash_6aa7c6326197ed35: ^1Bruno: ^7These boards will not hold them for long - just long enough for us to move to a stronger position.
hash_6acc2d3c40a78088: ^1Shaw: ^7How does that vomitous blighter even stay upright?
hash_6acc343c40a78c6d: ^1Diego: ^7I will snap those scrawny legs when I get the chance!
hash_6ad026339f075034: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to Provisions [Cost: &&1]
hash_6adbaec92fbef628: ^1Bruno: ^7There must be lifeboats nearby. I should get on lifeboat.     There is nothing here for me now.
hash_6adbafc92fbef7db: ^1Diego: ^7Hmm... Still alone. No sign of Scarlett nor Bruno.  I need an ally in this fight. Someone I can rely on when things get more dangerous - More wild!     Lady McKendrick?
hash_6adbb1c92fbefb41: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shake it off, Scar. Forget what he said on page 4. Forget everything the old bastard said. Concentrate on the now.
hash_6adbb4c92fbf005a: ^1Shaw: ^7That big stony thing I saw earlier looked really interesting.     Smelled nice, anyway. Very... Aromatic.
hash_6ae054de5fe4c04e: ^1Shaw: ^7It's not the bite that kills you... it's the fucking razor-storm.
hash_6ae056de5fe4c3b4: ^1Bruno: ^7It is as if the shards hypnotize them.
hash_6ae057de5fe4c567: ^1Diego: ^7You cannot resist the Viper's kiss, eh, chupacarnes?
hash_6aed43a50e52fa3e: ^1Shaw: ^7Life and death, all wrapped up in one handy package.
hash_6aed45a50e52fda4: ^1Bruno: ^7Let us send the monstres into the light.
hash_6aed46a50e52ff57: ^1Diego: ^7Let's light up this ocean liner -- make 'em see us from shore.
hash_6aed48a50e5302bd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's stick some light where the sun don't shine.
hash_6afc316a3709b688: ^1Diego: ^7My body... I felt myself disintegrate. I hope I'm still 'built' as I was...
hash_6afc326a3709b83b: ^1Bruno: ^7Now where am I? Am I still on this cursed vessel?
hash_6afc336a3709b9ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7That thing's handy for a quick exit...      Leaves the stomach a bit rough, though.
hash_6afc386a3709c26d: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been ripped across time and space!!     Oh no, I'm still on the ship.    ...fuck me.
hash_6b2b9b1b339e7812: ^1Diego: ^7When will they learn not to bunch together like that?
hash_6b2b9c1b339e79c5: ^1Bruno: ^7I could have used you in my Paris days.

hash_6b4884f0552575a3: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, the sniper rifle. Choice of the coward and the cautious.
hash_6b4886f055257909: ^1Scarlett: ^7Man, I've held gearsticks with more kickback that these puppies...

hash_6b532f5d19ae2e30: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you're looking to take something off, I'm sure these creatures would be more than happy to relieve you of a limb or two.      Either that or I will. Straighten up and fly right Shaw.
hash_6b685f2bd03ed636: ^1Shaw: ^7Feel the bite of my blade! I mean whip! Wait. Blade-whip? Whip-blade?
hash_6b68612bd03ed99c: ^1Bruno: ^7Magnifique. They fall like wheat before le Viper.
hash_6b68622bd03edb4f: ^1Diego: ^7Not the first sword I have held, but never one like this!
hash_6b68642bd03edeb5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn! The Viper is mean as a snake!
hash_6b92dce3d32bbe7e: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, keep coming -- plenty of volts to go around.
hash_6b92dee3d32bc1e4: ^1Bruno: ^7Fry, monstres! Every last one of you!
hash_6b92dfe3d32bc397: ^1Diego: ^7What do you know? Lightning does strike twice.
hash_6bac38874cc9d882: ^1Scarlett: ^7Could everyone just shut their yaps and concentrate on securing the area? I was told I could trust you. Can you please show me that

hash_6cd6dce28605b689: ^1Narrator: ^7Let's test your equipment. Kill these zombies with an Acid Bomb.
hash_6cf5788f763c3f18: ^1Shaw: ^7Diego helps another! A selfless act! Who is this swarthy rogue with the heart of gold?     There. I'm ready to write your next adventure.

hash_6df3551fe3b7e314: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not so much a weapon as it is a tool. Kinda like Diego.

hash_6e8a4403e5111237: ^1Diego: ^7I am sorry to report that your overall arm count is rather depleted.
hash_6ee9c4e2aeb0d23d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe this whole thing was a mistake.

hash_6f6c42938d24a639: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh! A hint of pomegranate! Or is that Pomeranian?
hash_6f6c43938d24a7ec: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw said I must drink.    But I do. not. want. to.
hash_6f6c44938d24a99f: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not consume for flavor - only for effect.
hash_6f6c45938d24ab52: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe mix it with a little whiskey next time.
hash_6f751626feaab360: ^1Shaw: ^7Ph, that blue fellow--! He's making the worm-brains stronger!!
hash_6f7712216de6b18e: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, grand. Does anybody else want to deal with that thing?!?
hash_6f7c44ab7ae17f56: ^1Shaw: ^7Bruno - I reckon you've shattered at least 46 bones in the last 10 seconds.
hash_6f7c47ab7ae1846f: ^1Diego: ^7Now that is how I expect a Legionnaire to fight!
hash_6f7c49ab7ae187d5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Did they have any other soldiers in the Legion - or were you a one man army?
hash_6fa4af4f36176ed3: ^1Narrator: ^7Perks can mean the difference between life and...you know.   Just buy it, will you?
hash_6ffa8ec68c2f2eee: ^1Shaw: ^7Did that surprise you? It did me.
hash_6ffa91c68c2f3407: ^1Diego: ^7You had many opportunities to turn and run away.
hash_6ffa93c68c2f376d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not in the mood tonight, slack-skin!
hash_70103806cee7cf1c: ^1Bruno: ^7I thought the medallion belonged to Scarlett - A gift from her father?
hash_701c3244456cdf46: ^1Shaw: ^7When Scarlett was little, Alistair brought her something quite similar as a gift. Hmmm... Maybe not the best idea.
hash_7099a81813f764cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw may be a good chemist, but he's a terrible barkeep.
hash_7099a91813f76682: ^1Bruno: ^7As a Chemist, Shaw does not appear to have the Midas touch.
hash_7099aa1813f76835: ^1Diego: ^7Leave it to a Brit to underestimate the importance of 'taste'.
hash_70b5472a2a30b800: ^1Shaw: ^7How long was I out? Did I miss anything?
hash_70b54c2a2a30c07f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's both pretend this didn't happen, all right?
hash_70b54e2a2a30c3e5: ^1Diego: ^7Admit it, Frenchman: the world would have been a darker place without Diego.
hash_70bcab00f5f49bb2: ^1Diego: ^7You should thank me for such a merciful death.
hash_70de8f4475e32d28: ^1Scarlett: ^7The passengers have been changed!   Just like that creep who snatched the artifact and started this whole thing!
hash_70de914475e3308e: ^1Diego: ^7I don't know why, but somehow - We  escaped being turned into monsters like everyone else on board.
hash_70de924475e33241: ^1Bruno: ^7A dark magique has cursed the whole ship - and those aboard.
hash_70e9fc6ccc1ad4f8: ^1Diego: ^7Did you see that?! I'm pretty sure several limbs definitely went airborne.
hash_70e9fd6ccc1ad6ab: ^1Bruno: ^7I've long become numb to the sound of explosions.
hash_70e9fe6ccc1ad85e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've been on the receiving end of a few explosions in my time - It's not fun.
hash_70ea036ccc1ae0dd: ^1Shaw: ^7I blew you to bits! 'Bits' that's  all you are now!
hash_70f13685e1bd6450: ^1Bruno: ^7Seeing that creature vomit...    Makes me wish to...
hash_70f13785e1bd6603: ^1Diego: ^7I am surprised to learn you still have stomachs to vomit from.
hash_70f13c85e1bd6e82: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh deary... you didn't have fish for dinner, did you??
hash_71070c2de4354319: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm thinking it may prove to be a pain to reload.
hash_7121ff3bf6e9c779: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm getting REALLY into this whole  murdering business.     I'm so glad it's just a dream!
hash_7122003bf6e9c92c: ^1Diego: ^7I will stand strong this night. I have the stamina of stallion.
hash_7122013bf6e9cadf: ^1Bruno: ^7The red mist descends once more. Will it ever clear?
hash_7127dbc40210eab5: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair, you devious devil! If this is all your way of collecting that bail money I still owe you...!
hash_713fe1b6b87da153: ^1Shaw: ^7Looks like it has a weak spot on its shoulders. Achilles' pimples, if you will.
hash_713fe4b6b87da66c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aim for the lumps on its back! And try not to throw up.
hash_71b75b50a35d49f3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hope that blast was effective as it sounded - I definitely heard bones break...
hash_71b75d50a35d4d59: ^1Diego: ^7I just got showered with blood. I may need a very long bath after this.
hash_71b75e50a35d4f0c: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not normally this destructive - except to myself.
hash_71d52f71d81884a7: ^1Diego: ^7I met Alistair last year - in Juarez, Mexico.     He was a man 'obsessed'...
hash_720561bc97e21378: ^1Shaw: ^7Si, Diego! Kill them all! Especially the ones nearest me!
hash_720566bc97e21bf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're enjoying this aren't you Diego? I can tell by that goofy grin.
hash_720567bc97e21daa: ^1Bruno: ^7You seem determined to show off, Diego...     Even if no one is watching.
hash_7206c8f8aa28c3d0: ^1Diego: ^7Out of ammo? How... reckless of me.
hash_7206c9f8aa28c583: ^1Bruno: ^7No ammo?     Fine. Then with my hands.
hash_7206caf8aa28c736: ^1Scarlett: ^7And that, as they say, is that...
hash_7206cff8aa28cfb5: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Shaw? I told you you'd run out of ammo, and what did you do?     Nothing!
hash_720de7e8e26bee7e: ^1Shaw: ^7It must be the artifact... It's transmogrified the passengers, to create...     A box!!
hash_720de9e8e26bf1e4: ^1Bruno: ^7Everything aboard this vessel has become twisted and malformed... but for what purpose?
hash_720deae8e26bf397: ^1Diego: ^7It looks very much like a box... and the purpose of a box - however strange - it to contain something.
hash_720dece8e26bf6fd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, what the hell?? Is that made from people??

hash_7224247fff4bb7f9: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful, now! The Viper's fangs are razor-sharp!
hash_7224257fff4bb9ac: ^1Diego: ^7You catch more flies with honey -- and more ghouls with blood.
hash_7224267fff4bbb5f: ^1Bruno: ^7I did not think the Viper could be more terrifying, but I was wrong.
hash_7224277fff4bbd12: ^1Scarlett: ^7Holy crap! The Viper just got meaner.

hash_72b09c91939e2b68: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly, a weapon this heavy actually just helps keep my hands steady.

hash_73d9d353e32e6fd9: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm here to rescue you Diego - Why do you look so worried?
hash_73d9d553e32e733f: ^1Bruno: ^7I expected better from you, Diego - I hope this does not become a habit.
hash_73d9d653e32e74f2: ^1Scarlett: ^7You can't be having fun down there...
hash_73ec8f0521f4e44a: ^1Shaw: ^7I's probably best if I hold onto this. Not sure the others can be trusted...
hash_73f5911e57e2b730: ^1Shaw: ^7What manner of chemical interaction could lead to a combustion that targets *only* our adversaries...     Frankly, I'm drawing a blank.
hash_73f5971e57e2c162: ^1Bruno: ^7Sometimes - Fire brings new life.     This fire, brings only death.
hash_73f5981e57e2c315: ^1Diego: ^7These are no flames of passion, but still - they remind me of Paris.
hash_741b522bf597f896: ^1Diego: ^7Give me a minute.     I'm sorry... But do you really not hear yourself?     I will help you - Just go over there for a little while.
hash_745095abfaa91ae3: ^1Diego: ^7Not for the first time, I have cheated death!     Given our current situation, I expect it will not be the last.

hash_7466febe556143c0: ^1Shaw: ^7You can fuck right off, you stabby-legged minge-bag!

hash_746704be55614df2: ^1Bruno: ^7I try to steer clear of violence these days, but killing you was a pleasure.
hash_746705be55614fa5: ^1Diego: ^7Rage before beauty, pendejo.     I am the beauty here, in case you missed it.
hash_747050d9b7fd2ced: ^1Bruno: ^7I see a lot of footwork Diego, but where is your blood lust?
hash_74b8b88b55ffeb41: ^1Diego: ^7I'm right here, cucos! Come and get me.
hash_74c1f36e54c89fda: ^1Diego: ^7*sigh* How many stokers worked on this ship, anyway?
hash_74c1f46e54c8a18d: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not think this shovel man has intelligence.
hash_74c4caca762d2a5f: ^1Scarlett: ^7My father - Alistair Rhodes - didn't give me up.      He tore our family a-fucking-part.
hash_7522c9a972b7fc3b: ^1Shaw: ^7My insides were out!! My outsides were in!! Who am I?? What am I??
hash_7522cca972b80154: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like my body got ripped through time and reassembled.
hash_7522cea972b804ba: ^1Diego: ^7I just... faded from existence... and then returned...
hash_7546f3915db47b43: ^1Shaw: ^7That cheeky blue fellow is giving his a friends a leg up!
hash_755a2afc6d9430b8: ^1Bruno: ^7Can we not simply push the fire-ghoul overboard?
hash_755a2bfc6d94326b: ^1Diego: ^7Of course they catch fire. At this point, why would they not?
hash_755a2dfc6d9435d1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I was just thinking we could use a good fire around here.
hash_755a30fc6d943aea: ^1Shaw: ^7Spontaneous combustion! I tell you, ghoul-chemistry could win me a Nobel Prize if I live through this!

hash_758512b1ddbb4b4c: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett...     If I'm honest, I could really do with some of my medicine - Just to take the edge off.
hash_75c7fe8593cb7d13: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you wink when you shot him, Diego? I think you did.
hash_75c8018593cb822c: ^1Scarlett: ^7It was probably glad you blew its head off Diego - Given the way you were grinning right before.
hash_75c8048593cb8745: ^1Bruno: ^7So You know which way to point a rifle, Mexicain... Well done.

hash_764c452747999722: ^1Shaw: ^7You're very angry! Have you met my wife, Evelyn?
hash_76523d7bd6bab908: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're a good man, Bruno. I just wish you knew that.
hash_76523f7bd6babc6e: ^1Diego: ^7The French Brute saves me! Are we mejores amigos now?
hash_7652427bd6bac187: ^1Shaw: ^7Thank you, Bruno. If I can ever return the favor, well, I'll try to be half-sober when the time comes.
hash_767eca1ff922fd4b: ^1Diego: ^7A tiny statue? What does it do?
hash_769f6af654b68f81: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay Shaw - Out of all of us, you probably knew my father best. Did he tell you *anything* else that might help us?     Help me?

hash_7728e444b9cd945f: ^1Narrator: ^7In exchange for points, the Mystery Box will generate a totally random weapon for you.
hash_772a2cda216cf0f7: ^1Scarlett: ^7I genuinely don't know if Shaw has any idea of what he just did...
hash_772b0669b01f349f: ^1Bruno: ^7When I met Alistair, I saw that same obsession - but I owe him my life.     And in turn - must help Scarlett.
hash_772b11cdf62789e8: ^1Diego: ^7I hope this holds once the attacks start coming.
hash_772b12cdf6278b9b: ^1Bruno: ^7I am interested to see how much damage this shield can sustain...
hash_772b13cdf6278d4e: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's more to this baby than first meets the eye.
hash_772b18cdf62795cd: ^1Shaw: ^7A... modified mobile defensive barrier! If only there was a simple, one word way to describe it.
hash_778f3dce913c7918: ^1Diego: ^7Hmmm.  Such enhancements are appreciated - most appreciated indeed.
hash_778f3fce913c7c7e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I feel like we can control some of these... cursed objects.
hash_778f44ce913c84fd: ^1Shaw: ^7I've seen enough of the supernatural to know that it's all hogwash. Especially this. This isn't real.
hash_7792d01200f0fbdd: ^1Shaw: ^7All this violent insanity and blood soaked decks aside - I really do hope the captain was able to send a distress message.
hash_7797105841e89e52: ^1Narrator: ^7You can't stay here. You've got to head through the door.
hash_77990c3b00f337e8: ^1Bruno: ^7Nothing will dispel that odor but a bullet.
hash_77990d3b00f3399b: ^1Diego: ^7¬°Ay, fo! That is bad -- but it is not 'Shaw bad.'
hash_77990f3b00f33d01: ^1Scarlett: ^7Fucking gas is...fucking with my head...can't think straight.
hash_7799123b00f3421a: ^1Shaw: ^7Can you not smell yourself, mate? Deodorant is your friend.
hash_77a5347ba9d34f00: ^1Bruno: ^7I'm sure it was not survival that taught you to shoot, Scarlett. But what was it?
hash_77a5357ba9d350b3: ^1Diego: ^7Dear Diary: Don't ever get on the wrong side of Ms Rhodes.
hash_77a53a7ba9d35932: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't get to keen on the RUSH, Scarlett.    It can get addictive very quickly.
hash_781dafec4ac0550f: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Use Fast Travel to the Boat Deck
hash_784d960f0f5006d3: ^1Shaw: ^7A giant fireman wielding a shovel?! Maybe he's friendly!
hash_784d9b0f0f500f52: ^1Diego: ^7Hmmm... the ship's Stoker does not seem happy with the current situation.    Join the club.
hash_784d9c0f0f501105: ^1Bruno: ^7He has a shovel? Bien. My fists have the strength of ten shovels.
hash_784ec5770c0f914c: ^1Shaw: ^7Just imagine what I could have done with a fork!
hash_788d048d47eab120: ^1Bruno: ^7What is wrong, Shaw? Did you take the wrong medicine?
hash_788d078d47eab639: ^1Scarlett: ^7Up and at 'em, Shaw. It's gonna be hard to find my Father without your help.
hash_78ba0f6f965fa64e: ^1Shaw: ^7I remember you as little girl, you weren't doing things like that.
hash_78ba116f965fa9b4: ^1Bruno: ^7I did not realize the extent of your skills, Scarlett. It is most impressive.
hash_78ba126f965fab67: ^1Diego: ^7Everyone look at what Scarlett is doing and try to do that. Okay?
hash_78c353e84aeeaab0: ^1Bruno: ^7Was that panic or strategy, Shaw? It was hard to tell from here!
hash_78c354e84aeeac63: ^1Diego: ^7Considering his 'dependencies', Shaw can be surprisingly focussed...
hash_78c356e84aeeafc9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Which of your 'medicines' got you in this mood, Shaw?
hash_78c9fa1c416dae20: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've got good news you dead-brain-freaks! The bounty on your asses just doubled.
hash_78c9fc1c416db186: ^1Diego: ^7Are you an ally, mysterious voice?     I am not so sure, eh?
hash_78c9fd1c416db339: ^1Bruno: ^7I take no pleasure in this bloodshed. Not any more.
hash_78c9ff1c416db69f: ^1Shaw: ^7Points, eh? Next you'll be telling me there's a big giant scoreboard keeping track.
