hash_78f5e75e93e2c9ed: ^1Diego: ^7Who would expect anything less from the Hijo de Mexico?
hash_7928815e70540f3b: ÓĚ≠®Ďeņ4FNöķRzęļ≠dŹ	ö«#Ą◊ůűč^1Scarlett: ^7That sneaky creep's healing all its friends!
hash_794d0a9b45042691: ^1Scarlett: ^7That sneaky creep's healing all its friends!
hash_79bf9a0b69911b80: ^1Bruno: ^7There was a time I could readily lay my hands on any weapon I chose.     There was no cost involved.
hash_79bf9b0b69911d33: ^1Diego: ^7I hope no one is insinuating that I am unable to pay my own way.
hash_79bf9d0b69912099: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wish I could get a deal on a halfway decent toolkit...      The things I could do.
hash_79bfa00b699125b2: ^1Shaw: ^7Something's happening. I think it's   a good thing. A real money saver.
hash_7a287075190064ab: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Cargo Hold
hash_7a4a742e7439faa0: ^1Shaw: ^7Why does it seem like we just made things worse?
hash_7a4a792e743a031f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Anyone else feel like I just hit the 'on' switch for the meat-grinder?
hash_7a4a7b2e743a0685: ^1Diego: ^7You know...this 'simple' assignment gets more and more complicated by the minute.
hash_7a50d68bace1e4ae: ^1Diego: ^7I will keep this. If the others behave themselves, maybe I will share.
hash_7a50d78bace1e661: ^1Bruno: ^7One more scrap to hold on to.
hash_7a50d98bace1e9c7: ^1Shaw: ^7You know - there's a chance that *this* could prove to be the key to everything.
hash_7a6d493e06d1b730: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not going to ask how this happened, Bruno - but I'm guessing you put up a hell of a fight!
hash_7a6d4e3e06d1bfaf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Nothing worse than a few bruises - You'll walk it off in no time.
hash_7a6d503e06d1c315: ^1Diego: ^7Did you fight many battles in the Legion - or was a lot of your time spent just sitting around.
hash_7a71eec4c6d6b138: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll be honest - I don't like all this extra attention.
hash_7a71f0c4c6d6b49e: ^1Diego: ^7Outnumbered again. Even in great numbers, your threats are somewhat 'toothless'.
hash_7a71f1c4c6d6b651: ^1Bruno: ^7So you finally realize that you are just too weak to threaten me alone.
hash_7a71f3c4c6d6b9b7: ^1Shaw: ^7If you've all gathered around hoping for a cure, I have some very bad news for you.
hash_7a7894a478692886: ^1Narrator: ^7You should already know how to open the door. That hasn't changed.
hash_7ac24f3a56ee14b8: ^1Bruno: ^7I will kill many birds with one stone. Explosive stone.
hash_7ac2503a56ee166b: ^1Diego: ^7I believe Pancho would love to get his hands on such firepower.
hash_7ac2523a56ee19d1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I built something like this when I was a kid. Dad never found out.
hash_7ac8baf29abdc860: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope your soul was freed long before now.
hash_7ac8bbf29abdca13: ^1Diego: ^7You thought your attack would leave me weakened? If anything, I was invigorated!
hash_7ad135e043cefb4b: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to Grand Staircase
hash_7ad2bf4909634e23: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not so hot. We're not shooting clay pigeons today...
hash_7ad2c04909634fd6: ^1Bruno: ^7The perfect weapon for an enemy on horizon. Not for one within biting distance.
hash_7ad2c14909635189: ^1Diego: ^7Though one bullet is usually enough, I do prefer to know there are more in the chamber.
hash_7ad2c2490963533c: ^1Shaw: ^7It's like fire poker. I suppose it could make a good bludgeon.
hash_7ad511c9ea0f0210: ^1Diego: ^7You shovel coal for a living, I kill people for a living. This was never really a fair fight.
hash_7ad512c9ea0f03c3: ^1Bruno: ^7Its death reminds me of Diego. Overdramatic.
hash_7ad518c9ea0f0df5: ^1Shaw: ^7The downside to being made out of coal? You're pretty fucking combustible, I'll tell you that.
hash_7b19ab05a72bb0cb: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm hoping I won't have to go up and down these stairs too often...    Bit hard on the old knees.
hash_7b19ae05a72bb5e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7By this point we should be relaxing in our cabins with the artifact safely stowed away.   Instead - We're fighting unnatural monsters aboard a sinking ship.
hash_7b19b005a72bb94a: ^1Diego: ^7I should have been drinking champagne on this staircase, enjoying the company of beautiful people, regaling aristocrats with tales of adventure.    But alas - it was not to be.
hash_7b19b105a72bbafd: ^1Bruno: ^7Throughout my life, whenever I have been in the presence of such wealth and opulence - violence and deceit were lurking in the shadows...
hash_7b1f61fff0da9af7: ^1Shaw: ^7The downside to being made out of coal? You're pretty combustible, I'll tell you that.
hash_7b2405ef4c6d2629: ^1Shaw: ^7I kill the monsters. Get paid points. Use said points to pay a wall for bullets.     What kind of economy is that?!
hash_7b2406ef4c6d27dc: ^1Diego: ^7I was hoping to not have to *purchase* more ammo...    That's a hint, fantasma.
hash_7b2408ef4c6d2b42: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's what I need. Ammo - and lots of it.
hash_7b3433b9c001f289: ^1Shaw: ^7Ow--! Like a shotgun blast...an inch from my ear...!
hash_7b3434b9c001f43c: ^1Diego: ^7Fucking mamon! I can't hear myself think!
hash_7b3435b9c001f5ef: ^1Bruno: ^7I will kill you for that...once my eyes start working...
hash_7b4243da20d4a7f4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Call it a mercy killing, though I don't feel much sympathy for any of you nightmares.
hash_7b4c801374a4ca58: ^1Scarlett: ^7First class... Just goes to show there's some things not even the rich can buy their way out of.
hash_7b4c821374a4cdbe: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, yes... Seems like only moments ago Lady McKendrick and I were here.     We had quite the evening planned.
hash_7b4c831374a4cf71: ^1Bruno: ^7Everything is twisted and broken.     Metal, flesh, bone - everything is... fused.
hash_7b4c851374a4d2d7: ^1Shaw: ^7Now that I think about it... how did the statue get in here?     I know, 'magic, magic, wooohoohoo!'     But seriously. That's solid stone. Even magic's gonna struggle with that.
hash_7b639be25b72c998: ^1Shaw: ^7The sun never sets -- least, not as long as I've got this little beauty.
hash_7b63a0e25b72d217: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I shoot this at Shaw, would screw his head on right?
hash_7b63a1e25b72d3ca: ^1Bruno: ^7I witnessed Ra's power before. I no longer question it.
hash_7b63a2e25b72d57d: ^1Diego: ^7Let's shed some light on these chupacarnes...
hash_7bb72ed0ca39ef50: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hope I haven't given you too much of this, Shaw... Not that you'd feel it.
hash_7bb730d0ca39f2b6: ^1Diego: ^7You must be very unlucky, Shaw. Either that or just a bit... useless.
hash_7bb731d0ca39f469: ^1Bruno: ^7You have to stay alert, Shaw - Many of the monsters you see are in fact REAL.
hash_7bdc9f45940df4fa: ^1Scarlett: ^7I recognize that smell - Paint stripper?!     Isn't that stuff corrosive?!
hash_7be414bb2a66a482: ^1Diego: ^7Primal Material? I do not understand much of what you say my friend, but let's just pretend that it is because of your accent...     And overall weirdness.
hash_7bf20484ef245168: ^1Shaw: ^7You can get lost staring into the depths of that thing.
hash_7bf20984ef2459e7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why is it that a gun from a wall makes my brain hurt more than walking dead people?
hash_7bf20a84ef245b9a: ^1Bruno: ^7The creatures wish to hurt us. But the walls wish to help us.     Someday life will make sense, but why start now?
hash_7bf20b84ef245d4d: ^1Diego: ^7So...was this originally designed as a military ship? Guns in the walls, hot and cold running ammo?
hash_7cc447929d3fe5b0: ^1Diego: ^7I know a cursed object when I see one. And boy oh boy do I see one.
hash_7cc449929d3fe916: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the Hell did you just say?
hash_7cc44e929d3ff195: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, I know exactly what you are. Question is - Who made you?
hash_7d6a4b7a2829ec1d: ^1Diego: ^7We are trapped. If we wish to survive, we really must fight our way out!
hash_7d72f7ee1d356968: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't think I'd ever be this desperate for a fully loaded gun.
hash_7d72f9ee1d356cce: ^1Diego: ^7Hmmm... empty? That cannot be right. Maybe it's jammed.
hash_7d72fcee1d3571e7: ^1Shaw: ^7No ammunition... I should get more.     Sooner rather than later.
hash_7d832efc513f4641: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm far too modest and self effacing to point out that - THAT - was almost entirely my doing.
hash_7d832ffc513f47f4: ^1Diego: ^7I am only surprised that it took so long... Given my many talents.
hash_7d8330fc513f49a7: ^1Bruno: ^7Little by little, we are making progress. Eh?

hash_7df193b085af536c: ^1Scarlett: ^7I learned long ago not to let failure get the better of me.
hash_7df196b085af5885: ^1Bruno: ^7A Legionnaire does not fail. He learns.
hash_7e1d49196ef29155: ^1Diego: ^7You toy with my emotions, before disappearing into the night...     What are you?
hash_7e2bf23c8d008b80: ^1Bruno: ^7Death does not always come quickly.     Sometimes it is... Agonizing.
hash_7e2bf33c8d008d33: ^1Diego: ^7And now, I shall perform a speciality of mine. It is known as -     El beso de la muerte!
hash_7e2bf53c8d009099: ^1Scarlett: ^7If it puts down the flesh-heads faster, then yes - I'm interested.
hash_7e2bf83c8d0095b2: ^1Shaw: ^7Ohh. I can feel that. I think I've been granted the touch of death.
hash_7e2ebfe7b5099a2e: Dining Hall to Promenade Starboard Door Unlocked!
hash_7e4d3380b9a5124c: ^1Shaw: ^7Adios! Amigas! Can you help a fella out here? I'm not quite ready to unleash *The Beast* - so I'm looking for a bit of... support?
hash_7e79b15db8123651: ^1Shaw: ^7You are the nicest ex-gangster, fugitive murderer, French Foreign Legion deserter I've ever met.
hash_7e79b25db8123804: ^1Diego: ^7Dear Diary: today, I was saved by an orangutan.
hash_7e79b45db8123b6a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You've got a pretty gentle touch. You know, for a human grizzly bear.
hash_7e7d3696edd025c3: ^1Shaw: ^7Is it dead?? Have we slain the beast??
hash_7e7d3996edd02adc: ^1Scarlett: ^7It died like it lived: ugly as fucking sin.
hash_7e7d3b96edd02e42: ^1Diego: ^7I feel...unclean after that. Like that time I seduced la abuela del alcalde.
hash_7e7d3c96edd02ff5: ^1Bruno: ^7Your twisted tongue torments me no more.
hash_7ee0d1946efa3d21: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to pick up Concentrated Purity
hash_7f13a69efbd6d206: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't feel my legs! Are they gone?? Oh wait, there they are. Thank the lord!
hash_7f13a89efbd6d56c: ^1Bruno: ^7I know I still have purpose. I cannot die here.
hash_7f13a99efbd6d71f: ^1Diego: ^7That was unfortunate. Now I may require assistance.
hash_7f13ab9efbd6da85: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey Fellas! Even if I don't make it - I hope you figure all this out.       And find Alistair.
hash_7f2166701d83408e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Are you flapping those gums at me, Diego?     Or just self aggrandizing for your own amusement?
hash_7f2fc79514ef4ec4: ^1Narrator: ^7That's your gun. You're supposed to be using the hammer.
hash_7f4544290c3a9700: ^1Bruno: ^7You give the French Kiss a bad name, you four-legged monstrosity!
hash_7f4547290c3a9c19: ^1Scarlett: ^7You are one ugly son of a bitch!
hash_7f454a290c3aa132: ^1Shaw: ^7Can somebody PLEASE shoot that pus-filled giraffe-legged donkey-cow!
hash_7f462ab50be41252: Bridge to Grand Stairs Door Unlocked!
hash_7f61d17dc72f6001: ^1Shaw: ^7A voice commands it. And it happens. An order. An order from the Great Beyond.     Is that how the world works now?
hash_7f61d27dc72f61b4: ^1Diego: ^7Mmmm, voices such as that are a usually a result of too much fine brandy - or cheap cigars.
hash_7f61d37dc72f6367: ^1Bruno: ^7Le fantome gives us with gifts with which to fight the monstres. I wonder which is our true enemy.
hash_7f61d47dc72f651a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I need - And just what those brain-dead-fuck-heads don't.
hash_7f84c71f406d0408: ^1Shaw: ^7I actually got a whiff of your breath there...
hash_7f84ce1f406d0fed: ^1Diego: ^7Believe me, I would rather not have gotten so close.
hash_7faed14034099710: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's like they're filled with burning pitch.
hash_7faed44034099c29: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde! A little closer and I would be Bruno flambe.
hash_7faed64034099f8f: ^1Shaw: ^7Ahhhhhh--oh wait, no. That part of my skin's already burnt.     Never mind.
hash_7fb992c7c602f67e: ^1Diego: ^7I almost married a legless woman in Juarez - And then she walked out on me.     It is not a joke. She was the only woman to ever leave me.
hash_7fb995c7c602fb97: ^1Shaw: ^7We should each claim a crawler and race them against each other! I'm naming mine, 'Floor Admiral.'
hash_7fbac7ad1f3a5356: ^1Shaw: ^7I'd appreciate it if you kept your grubby little paws away from me.
hash_7fbac9ad1f3a56bc: ^1Bruno: ^7You are starting a fight you will not win.
hash_7fbacaad1f3a586f: ^1Diego: ^7Hands off the merchandise! This coat was crafted by Italy's finest tailors.
hash_7fbaccad1f3a5bd5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey! We ain't doing the damn foxtrot!
hash_7fd84a790b240003: ^1Diego: ^7It seems the artifact - my medallion - has somehow wrought the chaos that unfolds all around us.    Now we must decide how best to react.
hash_7fe0edb8ef664efd: ^1Narrator: ^7There you go. I told you it wasn't as dangerous as it looked!
hash_7feb92f1a2f7383e: ^1Shaw: ^7This Order. Took Alistair. Very devious. Not good-willed. What do they want? What do we want? What do they know? What do we know?
hash_7feb94f1a2f73ba4: ^1Bruno: ^7When I met Alistair, he was a man driven by obsession. I almost envy him.
hash_7feb95f1a2f73d57: ^1Diego: ^7I think there is something Scarlett is not telling us - perhaps many things...
hash_7feb97f1a2f740bd: ^1Scarlett: ^7I find myself wondering why they weren't at the Mansion that night -      Are they really my father's closest friends?
hash_7ffddf1135c69df9: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett! Forgive me if this is a personal question, but have you ever killed a man before?
hash_7ffde01135c69fac: ^1Diego: ^7WOW Scarlett! You are a very fine shot indeed!     Very fine... indeed.
